trans-unit.id: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.
trans-unit.source: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.
trans-unit.target: Pantalones Capri (también conocido como pantalones de tres cuartos, capris, pantalones de cultivo, empujadores del pedal, cavadores de la almeja, pantalones de inundación, "jams", aguas altas, culottes o pantalones de torero) son los pantalones más largos que los pantalones cortos, pero no tan largos como los pantalones largos.

trans-unit.id: Dorky sombrero that doesn't fit anyone. You feel embarrassed to wear it.
trans-unit.source: Dorky sombrero that doesn't fit anyone. You feel embarrassed to wear it.
trans-unit.target: El Sombrero de Tonto que no le queda bien a nadie. Te da vergüenza usarlo.

trans-unit.id: Cool piratey shirt that makes your biceps look bigger than they really are.
trans-unit.source: Cool piratey shirt that makes your biceps look bigger than they really are.
trans-unit.target: Camisa pirata cool que hace que tus bíceps parezcan más grandes de lo que realmente son.

trans-unit.id: Basic, ordinary, every day, run of the mill, nondescript, conventional, commonplace, humdrum, standard, middle-of-the-road, garden-variety low-top shoes.
trans-unit.source: Basic, ordinary, every day, run of the mill, nondescript, conventional, commonplace, humdrum, standard, middle-of-the-road, garden-variety low-top shoes.
trans-unit.target: Zapatillas de jardín, básicos, ordinarios, cotidianos, corrientes, anodinos, convencionales, comunes, aburridos, humildes, estándar, de medio camino.

trans-unit.id: The hair with a completely normal amount of flare.
trans-unit.source: The hair with a completely normal amount of flare.
trans-unit.target: El cabello con una cantidad completamente normal de destellos.

trans-unit.id: The haircut your mom always made you get before you realized you could make your own decisions.
trans-unit.source: The haircut your mom always made you get before you realized you could make your own decisions.
trans-unit.target: El corte de pelo que tu mamá siempre te hacía antes de darte cuenta que podías tomar tus propias decisiones.

trans-unit.id: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
trans-unit.source: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
trans-unit.target: Botas altas hasta la rodilla son botas que se elevan hasta la rodilla, o levemente debajo de ella. Generalmente están más apretados alrededor del eje de la pierna y el tobillo que en la parte superior.

trans-unit.id: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
trans-unit.source: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
trans-unit.target: Un par de pantalones resistentes y delgados. Los pantalones son una prenda de vestir que se lleva desde la cintura hasta los tobillos, cubriendo ambas piernas por separado (en lugar de cubrirlas con un paño que se extiende a través de ambas piernas, como en túnicas, faldas y vestidos).

trans-unit.id: Lighter pack that causes lower calorie consumption.
trans-unit.source: Lighter pack that causes lower calorie consumption.
trans-unit.target: Mochila ligera que provoca un menor consumo de calorías.

trans-unit.id: A trussed roast baked to perfection.
trans-unit.source: A trussed roast baked to perfection.
trans-unit.target: Un asado a las brasas cocido a la perfección.

trans-unit.id: A dense whole wheat unleavened bread.
trans-unit.source: A dense whole wheat unleavened bread.
trans-unit.target: Pan denso de trigo integral ácimo.

trans-unit.id: A seemingly random assortment of wild plants that form a sort of salad.
trans-unit.source: A seemingly random assortment of wild plants that form a sort of salad.
trans-unit.target: Un surtido aparentemente aleatorio de plantas silvestres que forman una especie de ensalada.

trans-unit.id: Smashed beans can work as a thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.source: Smashed beans can work as a thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.target: Los granos machacados pueden actuar como espesantes o potenciadores del sabor.

trans-unit.id: Just because the name has 'bear' in it doesn't mean it actually contains bear.
trans-unit.source: Just because the name has 'bear' in it doesn't mean it actually contains bear.
trans-unit.target: Sólo porque el nombre tiene "oso" en él no significa que realmente contiene oso.

trans-unit.id: A brilliantly colored bulb with an earthy sweetness.
trans-unit.source: A brilliantly colored bulb with an earthy sweetness.
trans-unit.target: Un bulbo de colores brillantes con una dulzura terrosa.

trans-unit.id: Boiled sausages might not be as pretty as grilled ones, but they're still tasty.
trans-unit.source: Boiled sausages might not be as pretty as grilled ones, but they're still tasty.
trans-unit.target: Las salchichas cocidas pueden no ser tan bonitas como las asadas a la parrilla, pero siguen siendo sabrosas.

trans-unit.id: A delicious, crispy crust hides the soft interior.
trans-unit.source: A delicious, crispy crust hides the soft interior.
trans-unit.target: Una deliciosa y crujiente corteza oculta el suave interior.

trans-unit.id: A bread with a camas twist for a bit of flavor and fun.
trans-unit.source: A bread with a camas twist for a bit of flavor and fun.
trans-unit.target: Pan con una pizca de camasia, que le da un toque de sabor y diversión.

trans-unit.id: A spread of evenly baked camas bulbs; soft in the middle, golden brown on the outside.
trans-unit.source: A spread of evenly baked camas bulbs; soft in the middle, golden brown on the outside.
trans-unit.target: Plato con varios bulbos de camasia uniformemente horneados, con un toque suave en su centro y con un color marrón dorado en el exterior.

trans-unit.id: Pulverized camas works as an excellent thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.source: Pulverized camas works as an excellent thickener or flavour enhancer.
trans-unit.target: Camasias pulverizadas. Funciona muy bien como espesante o potenciador del sabor.

trans-unit.id: The uneven flame might be mediocre for cooking, but the open flame imparts a great flavor.
trans-unit.source: The uneven flame might be mediocre for cooking, but the open flame imparts a great flavor.
trans-unit.target: La llama desigual puede ser mediocre para cocinar, pero la llama abierta imparte un gran sabor.

trans-unit.id: A by-product of milling, the germ is the reproductive part of the cereal that germinates.
trans-unit.source: A by-product of milling, the germ is the reproductive part of the cereal that germinates.
trans-unit.target: Subproducto de la molienda, el germen es la parte reproductora del cereal que germina.

trans-unit.id: Perhaps not the best raw vegetable to char, this beet seems to have held up well enough.
trans-unit.source: Perhaps not the best raw vegetable to char, this beet seems to have held up well enough.
trans-unit.target: Tal vez no sea la mejor verdura cruda para carbonizar, pero esta remolacha parece aguantar bastante bien.

trans-unit.id: A fibrous and sweet treat much like a sweet potato, though slightly blackened over the heat of a campfire.
trans-unit.source: A fibrous and sweet treat much like a sweet potato, though slightly blackened over the heat of a campfire.
trans-unit.target: Un manjar fibroso y dulce parecido a una patata, aunque ligeramente ennegrecido por el calor de una fogata.

trans-unit.id: At least it doesn't have any scales any more.
trans-unit.source: At least it doesn't have any scales any more.
trans-unit.target: Al menos ya no tiene escamas.

trans-unit.id: A warmly colored kernel studded vegetable.
trans-unit.source: A warmly colored kernel studded vegetable.
trans-unit.target: Un vegetal tachonado de color cálido.

trans-unit.id: These deep fried corn treats are both crispy and delicious.
trans-unit.source: These deep fried corn treats are both crispy and delicious.
trans-unit.target: Estas golosinas de maíz frito son crujientes y deliciosas.

trans-unit.id: Dried and ground corn; it's like a courser flour.
trans-unit.source: Dried and ground corn; it's like a courser flour.
trans-unit.target: Maíz seco y molido; es como una harina courser.

trans-unit.id: Obtained from the endosperm of the kernal, cornstarch can be used as a thickening agent for sauces.
trans-unit.source: Obtained from the endosperm of the kernal, cornstarch can be used as a thickening agent for sauces.
trans-unit.target: Obtenido a partir del endospermo del kernal, la fécula de maíz puede ser utilizada como agente espesante para salsas.

trans-unit.id: Edible mushrooms that are quite tasty.
trans-unit.source: Edible mushrooms that are quite tasty.
trans-unit.target: Setas comestibles que son muy sabrosas.

trans-unit.id: Just in case you want to eat red things without eating meat.
trans-unit.source: Just in case you want to eat red things without eating meat.
trans-unit.target: Por si quieres comer cosas rojas sin comer carne.

trans-unit.id: Give me all the bacon and eggs you have.
trans-unit.source: Give me all the bacon and eggs you have.
trans-unit.target: Dame todo el tocino y huevos que tengas.
Una solución de reemplazo de comida completa.

trans-unit.id: A tasty treat made from corn tortillas and meat.
trans-unit.source: A tasty treat made from corn tortillas and meat.
trans-unit.target: Una delicia hecha con tortillas de maíz y carne.

trans-unit.id: A prime cut of meat surrounded by pastry.
trans-unit.source: A prime cut of meat surrounded by pastry.
trans-unit.target: Un primer corte de carne rodeado de pasta.

trans-unit.id: A bitter, brightly colored shoot similar to asparagus.
trans-unit.source: A bitter, brightly colored shoot similar to asparagus.
trans-unit.target: Brote amargo y de color brillante similar al espárrago.

trans-unit.id: Without any leavening the flatbread isn't very puffy. But it's still tasty.
trans-unit.source: Without any leavening the flatbread isn't very puffy. But it's still tasty.
trans-unit.target: Sin levadura, el pan no está muy hinchado. Pero sigue siendo sabroso.
El secreto está en la salsa.

trans-unit.id: While tomatoes are fruits, you don't usually put them in fruit salads.
trans-unit.source: While tomatoes are fruits, you don't usually put them in fruit salads.
trans-unit.target: Mientras que los tomates son frutas, no se suelen poner en las ensaladas de frutas.

trans-unit.id: A bulbous fruit that used to top Saguaro cacti.
trans-unit.source: A bulbous fruit that used to top Saguaro cacti.
trans-unit.target: Fruta bulbosa que se encuentra en la parte superior de los saguaros.

trans-unit.id: A concentrated blast of huckleberry goodness.
trans-unit.source: A concentrated blast of huckleberry goodness.
trans-unit.target: Una ráfaga concentrada de generosos arándanos.

trans-unit.id: A fantastic combination of flaky crust and scrumptious berries.
trans-unit.source: A fantastic combination of flaky crust and scrumptious berries.

trans-unit.id: Oil infused with flavor to enhance it.

trans-unit.id: A small circular biscuit with a sweet huckleberry filling.
trans-unit.source: A small circular biscuit with a sweet huckleberry filling.

Para pulverizar líquidos con alto contenido graso.

trans-unit.target: Como una tarta de arándanos, pero llena hasta el borde de suculenta carne.

trans-unit.id: Milk, although maybe not from an animal.

trans-unit.id: A plant fat extracted for use in cooking.

trans-unit.id: A fatty cut of meat that happens to be inexplicably tastier than other cuts.

trans-unit.id: A fatty cut of raw fish.

trans-unit.id: Fresh raw meat from the hunt. It should probably be cooked before being consumed.

trans-unit.target: Carne fresca cruda de la caza. Probablemente debería cocinarse antes de consumirse.

trans-unit.id: A trussed roast tied and ready to be cooked.
trans-unit.source: A trussed roast tied and ready to be cooked.

trans-unit.id: Ground meat stuffed into an intestine casing.
trans-unit.source: Ground meat stuffed into an intestine casing.

trans-unit.id: A cut of perfectly seared steak.
trans-unit.source: A cut of perfectly seared steak.

trans-unit.id: Meat cooked in meat juices keeps the meat juicy.
trans-unit.source: Meat cooked in meat juices keeps the meat juicy.
trans-unit.target: La carne cocida en jugos de carne mantiene la carne jugosa.

trans-unit.id: Even sweet lovers don't eat sugar plain.
trans-unit.source: Even sweet lovers don't eat sugar plain.

trans-unit.id: The sweetness of the fruits happens to work well with the salad.
trans-unit.source: The sweetness of the fruits happens to work well with the salad.
trans-unit.target: La dulzura de las frutas resulta que trabajan bien con la ensalada.

trans-unit.id: Rendered animal fat useful for more than just cooking.
trans-unit.source: Rendered animal fat useful for more than just cooking.
trans-unit.target: Grasa animal extraída de un animal muerto, útil para cocinar y mucho más.

trans-unit.id: Intelligence is knowing this is a fruit; wisdom is not putting it in a fruit salad.
trans-unit.source: Intelligence is knowing this is a fruit; wisdom is not putting it in a fruit salad.
trans-unit.target: Inteligencia es saber que esto es un fruto; sabiduría es no ponerlo en una ensalada de frutas.

trans-unit.id: Any enzyme that can be used to bond proteins together.
trans-unit.source: Any enzyme that can be used to bond proteins together.
trans-unit.target: Cualquier enzima que se puede utilizar para unir proteínas.

trans-unit.id: Who knew plants in plant broth could be so tasty?

trans-unit.id: A hearty stock full of assorted vegetables.

trans-unit.id: A common grain that is significantly more useful processed.

trans-unit.id: While a bunch of wilted fiddleheads may seem a bit sad, at least they're nutritious.

trans-unit.target: Aunque un montón de helechos marchitos puedan parecer algo triste, al menos son nutritivos.

trans-unit.id: When a shelf and a cabinet aren't enough individually.

trans-unit.id: A stone stand which can hold burning fuel to provide light.

trans-unit.id: A container you can store items in.

trans-unit.id: Allows the selling and trading of items.
trans-unit.source: Allows the selling and trading of items.

trans-unit.id: A heavy stove for cooking more complex dishes.
trans-unit.source: A heavy stove for cooking more complex dishes.
trans-unit.target: Una estufa pesada para cocinar platos más complejos.

trans-unit.id: A towering metal light post that requires electricity to run.
trans-unit.source: A towering metal light post that requires electricity to run.
trans-unit.target: Un poste de luz altísimo de metal que requiere electricidad para operar.

trans-unit.id: A candle which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.source: A candle which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.target: Una vela que puede quemar sebo para producir una pequeña cantidad de luz.

trans-unit.id: A pottery lamp. Fuel with tallow.

trans-unit.target: Una lámpara de cerámica. Alimentada con sebo.

trans-unit.id: A candle mounted on a wall bracket which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.source: A candle mounted on a wall bracket which can burn tallow to produce a small amount of light.
trans-unit.target: Una vela montada en un soporte de pared que puede quemar sebo para producir una pequeña cantidad de luz.

trans-unit.id: A set of smoothing and woodworking tools that assist in creating wheels and transportation.
trans-unit.source: A set of smoothing and woodworking tools that assist in creating wheels and transportation.
trans-unit.target: Un conjunto de herramientas para alisar y trabajar la madera que ayudan a crear las ruedas y transporte.
Una vela montada en la pared.

trans-unit.id: Sometimes it can be nice to have clean clothes.
trans-unit.source: Sometimes it can be nice to have clean clothes.
trans-unit.target: A veces puede ser agradable tener ropa limpia.

trans-unit.id: Why hand scrub your clothes on a washboard when you could throw them into this magical cleaning machine?
trans-unit.source: Why hand scrub your clothes on a washboard when you could throw them into this magical cleaning machine?
trans-unit.target: ¿Por qué fregar a mano su ropa en una tabla de lavar cuando usted podría tirarla en esta máquina de limpieza mágica?

trans-unit.id: A much more comfortable bed made with fabric.
trans-unit.source: A much more comfortable bed made with fabric.
trans-unit.target: Una cama mucho más cómoda hecha con tela.

trans-unit.id: A nice, scratchy and horrible uncomfortable bed. But at least it keeps you off the ground.

trans-unit.target: Una cama agradable, rasposa y horriblemente incómoda. Pero al menos te mantiene fuera del suelo.

trans-unit.id: A large sign for all your large text needs!

trans-unit.target: ¡Un cartel grande para todas tus grandes necesidades de texto!

trans-unit.id: A bench for the basics and making even more benches.

trans-unit.target: Un banco para lo básico y hacer aún más bancos.

trans-unit.source: Whether to use a whitelist to choose which mods to load. If disabled, all mods will be loaded.

trans-unit.source: Check for unity file updates regularly. (Useful if you are actively building mod bundles and don't want to restart the server to test changes.)

trans-unit.target: Sí quieres publicar este servidor en la lista publica de servidores de Strange Loop Games.

Puerto para el tráfico del juego.

trans-unit.source: Scales how time of day matches real time. Higher numbers result in shorter day/night cycles, but will not affect simulation speed.

trans-unit.source: How often to write changed data to disk, in seconds.

trans-unit.source: If true, removes failed to load objects upon loading.

trans-unit.source: Users on the whitelist do not need to enter a password to connect to a passworded server. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64

trans-unit.id: After harvesting, we reset their growth percent to this value, 0 -1. 0 means kill the plant.
trans-unit.source: After harvesting, we reset their growth percent to this value, 0 -1. 0 means kill the plant.
trans-unit.target: Después de cosechar, reajustamos su porcentaje de crecimiento a este valor, 0 -1. 0 significa matar a la planta.

trans-unit.id: If this gets scythed, does it die?
trans-unit.source: If this gets scythed, does it die?

trans-unit.id: If I can pick this, at what percent is that possible?
trans-unit.source: If I can pick this, at what percent is that possible?
trans-unit.target: ¿Si puedo escoger a esto, en qué por ciento es posible?

trans-unit.id: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.
trans-unit.source: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.
trans-unit.target: El parámetro de tasa exponencial que describe la tasa de natalidad de la especie en condiciones ideales de crecimiento y sin competencia. El % de la población en el área que se reproducirá en una solo tick.

trans-unit.id: The exponential rate parameter describing the death rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will die in one tick. Should always be LESS than MaxGrowthRate.
trans-unit.source: The exponential rate parameter describing the death rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition. The % of the population in the area that will die in one tick. Should always be LESS than MaxGrowthRate.
trans-unit.target: El parámetro de tasa exponencial que describe la tasa de mortalidad de la especie en condiciones ideales de crecimiento y sin competencia. El porcentaje de la población de la zona que morirá en un tick. Siempre debe ser MENOS que MaxGrowthRate.

trans-unit.id: The exponential rate parameter describing the rate at which the plant spreads to adjacent locations.
trans-unit.source: The exponential rate parameter describing the rate at which the plant spreads to adjacent locations.
trans-unit.target: El parámetro de velocidad exponencial que describe la velocidad a la que la planta se extiende a ubicaciones adyacentes.
Recursos consumibles que limitan el crecimiento.
Capacidades medioambientales que limitan el crecimiento.

trans-unit.id: The plant's preferred temperature range. Temperatures in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.source: The plant's preferred temperature range. Temperatures in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.target: Rango de temperatura preferido de la planta. Las temperaturas en este rango no inhiben el crecimiento de la población ni reducen el rendimiento.

trans-unit.id: The plant's preferred moisture range. Moisture in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.source: The plant's preferred moisture range. Moisture in this range won't inhibit population growth or reduce yield.
trans-unit.target: Rango de humedad preferido de la planta. La humedad en este rango no inhibirá el crecimiento de la población ni reducirá el rendimiento.

trans-unit.id: The temperature range that can support this plant (albeit at reduced efficiency if the temperature is not also within the ideal range). Temperatures outside this range prohibit reproduction entirely and prevent any yield at all.
trans-unit.source: The temperature range that can support this plant (albeit at reduced efficiency if the temperature is not also within the ideal range). Temperatures outside this range prohibit reproduction entirely and prevent any yield at all.
trans-unit.target: El rango de temperatura que puede soportar esta planta (aunque no en reducción de la eficacia si la temperatura no está también dentro de la gama ideal). Temperaturas fuera de este rango prohíben completamente la reproducción y previenen cualquier rendimiento en absoluto.

trans-unit.id: The maximum ground pollution density that the plant can tolerate. Above this value, the plant cannot reproduce, and will have zero yield.
trans-unit.source: The maximum ground pollution density that the plant can tolerate. Above this value, the plant cannot reproduce, and will have zero yield.
trans-unit.target: La densidad de contaminación de tierra máxima que la planta puede tolerar. Por encima de este valor, la planta no puede reproducirse y tendrá cero producción.

trans-unit.id: The voxelsPerEntry that this species should be tracked at.
trans-unit.source: The voxelsPerEntry that this species should be tracked at.
trans-unit.target: El voxelsPerEntry en la que esta especie debería ser rastreada.

trans-unit.id: The string which is used as an identifier for this species. Cannot be edited freely, as it is referenced by other config.
trans-unit.source: The string which is used as an identifier for this species. Cannot be edited freely, as it is referenced by other config.
trans-unit.target: La cadena que se utiliza como identificador para esta especie. No puede ser editado libremente, ya que es referenciado por otras configuraciones.

trans-unit.id: The displayed name of this species. Can be edited freely.
trans-unit.source: The displayed name of this species. Can be edited freely.
trans-unit.target: El nombre mostrado de esta especie. Puede ser editado libremente.

trans-unit.target: Edad de madurez en días. Los organismos más antiguos que este valor se consideran completamente desarrollados y pueden reproducirse.

trans-unit.id: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).\n\nTo play here, you will need to switch to the staging build.
trans-unit.source: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).\n\nTo play here, you will need to switch to the staging build.
trans-unit.target: Este es un servidor de prueba que contiene la próxima versión estable del juego para que puedas jugar sin inconvenientes a largo plazo.\n\nPara jugar aquí, necesitarás cambiarte a la compilación de "staging".

trans-unit.id: In Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'. On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.
trans-unit.source: In Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'. On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.
trans-unit.target: Dentro de Steam, haz clic derecho en Eco, y selecciona "Propiedades". En la pestaña de Beta, únete y selecciona la compilación llamada "Staging".

trans-unit.target: Puede que debas esperar hasta que orbite hacia este lado del mundo.

trans-unit.id: Since all your resources to do this come from the environment, you could very well destroy the planet before the meteor even impacts.
trans-unit.source: Since all your resources to do this come from the environment, you could very well destroy the planet before the meteor even impacts.
trans-unit.target: Ya que todos sus recursos para hacer esto provienen del medio ambiente, usted podría destruir el planeta antes de que el meteoro incluso impacte.

trans-unit.id: To navigate these twin dangers, you'll need to collaborate with your fellow citizens to build a thriving economy tempered by a well-run government.
trans-unit.source: To navigate these twin dangers, you'll need to collaborate with your fellow citizens to build a thriving economy tempered by a well-run government.
trans-unit.target: Para hacer frente a estos dos peligros, tendrá que colaborar con sus conciudadanos para construir una economía próspera templada por un gobierno bien dirigido.

trans-unit.id: Together with your fellow citizens, you'll need to advance civilization to a level of technology capable of stopping the meteor.
trans-unit.source: Together with your fellow citizens, you'll need to advance civilization to a level of technology capable of stopping the meteor.
trans-unit.target: Junto con sus conciudadanos, tendrán que hacer avanzar la civilización a un nivel de tecnología capaz de detener el meteorito.

trans-unit.id: You'll advance technology and acquire massive power over the environment.
trans-unit.source: You'll advance technology and acquire massive power over the environment.
trans-unit.target: Usted avanzará la tecnología y adquirirá un poder masivo sobre el medio ambiente.

trans-unit.id: You'll create cities, markets, and a thriving industry.
trans-unit.source: You'll create cities, markets, and a thriving industry.
trans-unit.target: Creará ciudades, mercados y una industria próspera.

trans-unit.id: You'll elect leaders and pass laws to grow your economy and protect the ecosystem.
trans-unit.source: You'll elect leaders and pass laws to grow your economy and protect the ecosystem.
trans-unit.target: Usted elegirá líderes y aprobará leyes para hacer crecer su economía y proteger el ecosistema.

trans-unit.id: You are not the owner of this deed.
trans-unit.source: You are not the owner of this deed.
trans-unit.target: No eres el dueño de esta escritura.

trans-unit.source: This sale listing no longer exists.

trans-unit.source: Cannot trade: Desk is not in a valid state. Check the Status tab for more details.

trans-unit.id: Need to give your currency a backing item before you can craft it.
trans-unit.source: Need to give your currency a backing item before you can craft it.
trans-unit.target: Necesita darle a su divisa un elemento de respaldo antes de que pueda crearla.

trans-unit.id: A soft rock, with few potential uses. Shale is a sedimentary rock formed by thin layers of compacted clay or mud.
trans-unit.source: A soft rock, with few potential uses. Shale is a sedimentary rock formed by thin layers of compacted clay or mud.
trans-unit.target: Roca endeble y de poca utilidad. La pizarra es una roca sedimentaria formada por finas capas de arcilla o adobe compactado.

trans-unit.id: A chemical compound used in steel production.
trans-unit.source: A chemical compound used in steel production.
trans-unit.target: Producto químico empleado en la producción de acero.
Una Cabra de las Rocosas muerta.

trans-unit.id: A hard rock useful for construction and industrial processes. Limestone is sedimentary, forming mostly from the fallen compacted remains of marine organisms.
trans-unit.source: A hard rock useful for construction and industrial processes. Limestone is sedimentary, forming mostly from the fallen compacted remains of marine organisms.
trans-unit.target: Roca dura, utilizada para la construcción y para procesos industriales. La piedra caliza es sedimentaria, formándose principalmente por compactación de restos de organismos marinos.

trans-unit.id: A hard rock useful for construction, and host to various ores. Granite forms from cooling magma deep underground. It is the most common continental rock type!
trans-unit.source: A hard rock useful for construction, and host to various ores. Granite forms from cooling magma deep underground. It is the most common continental rock type!
trans-unit.target: Roca dura, empleada en construcción y por su capacidad para albergar otros minerales en su interior. El granito se forma por el enfriamiento del magma en la corteza terrestre, y es el tipo de roca más común en los continentes.

trans-unit.id: A hard rock with some uses in construction. Gneiss is a metamorphic rock formed from previous rock recrystallizing at high pressures and temperatures deep in the earth.
trans-unit.source: A hard rock with some uses in construction. Gneiss is a metamorphic rock formed from previous rock recrystallizing at high pressures and temperatures deep in the earth.
trans-unit.target: Una roca dura con algunos usos en la construcción. Gneis es una roca metamórfica formada a partir de rocas anteriores que se recristalizan a altas presiones y temperaturas en las profundidades de la tierra.

trans-unit.id: A very fine grained deposit of weathered bits of rock. Plastic when wet and brittle when dry, clay is impermeable to many liquids and useful for many industrial and environmental purposes.
trans-unit.source: A very fine grained deposit of weathered bits of rock. Plastic when wet and brittle when dry, clay is impermeable to many liquids and useful for many industrial and environmental purposes.
trans-unit.target: Depósito de trozos de roca con grano muy fino. De aspecto plástico al estar húmedo y frágil al secarse, la arcilla es impermeable a muchos líquidos y, por tanto, de gran utilidad para muchos usos industriales y medioambientales.

trans-unit.id: A hard and heavy rock with some uses in construction. Basalt forms directly from lava erupted volcanically, making it an extrusive igneous rock. The basis of all bedrock in the oceans.
trans-unit.source: A hard and heavy rock with some uses in construction. Basalt forms directly from lava erupted volcanically, making it an extrusive igneous rock. The basis of all bedrock in the oceans.
trans-unit.target: Roca dura y pesada, con diversos usos en construcción. El basalto se forma por enfriamiento directo de la lava volcánica, creando un tipo de roca ígnea extrusiva. Conforma el lecho rocoso de todos los océanos.

trans-unit.id: A homely recipe made from a mix of cooked rice and fruit. Not only is it friendly, but it also happens to be pan fried.

trans-unit.id: Loan a given amount for a set period to another citizen, with interest.\n\nThe borrower can specify the amount they want to borrow, which the lender defines in the 'allowed debt' range.
trans-unit.source: Loan a given amount for a set period to another citizen, with interest.\n\nThe borrower can specify the amount they want to borrow, which the lender defines in the 'allowed debt' range.
trans-unit.target: Presta una cantidad dada a otro ciudadano durante un tiempo determinado, aplicando un interés por solicitar dicho préstamo.\n\nEl prestatario puede especificar la cantidad que quiere pedir en préstamo, siempre y cuando esté dentro del "intervalo permitido" establecido por el prestamista.

trans-unit.id: Sell a bond for a given value, which will be paid back over a set period of time with interest.\n\nThe bond purchaser can choose what value of bond they want to buy, within a range set by the bond seller.
trans-unit.source: Sell a bond for a given value, which will be paid back over a set period of time with interest.\n\nThe bond purchaser can choose what value of bond they want to buy, within a range set by the bond seller.
trans-unit.target: Vende un empréstito por el valor elegido, que puede devolverse en un periodo de tiempo determinado aunque con un interés asociado.\n\nEl comprador del empréstito puede elegir qué valor quiere para el empréstito, dentro de un rango predefinido por el prestador.

trans-unit.id: Defines a position where a room must be built, with a minimum volume and made of at least the listed materials.\nThe position is marked by a {0}, and you must place one on the location you want the room built.
trans-unit.source: Defines a position where a room must be built, with a minimum volume and made of at least the listed materials.\nThe position is marked by a {0}, and you must place one on the location you want the room built.
trans-unit.target: Define una posición en la que debe construirse un cuarto, con un volumen mínimo y que debe construirse, como mínimo, con los materiales especificados.\nSe indicará la posición con un {0}, y deberás colocar uno de los materiales en la ubicación en la que quieres colocar el cuarto.

trans-unit.id: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.
trans-unit.source: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.
trans-unit.target: Planifica un camino a construir entre los puntos A y B, que se definen colocando un {0} en cada uno de estos puntos. La anchura del camino tendrá un valor mínimo también predefinido, y deberá completarse solamente con el material especificado.

trans-unit.id:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.source:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.target:
Define un conjunto de bloques que deben existir/no existir en una propiedad. Esta opción puede emplearse con diversas funciones:
 - Eliminar plantas no deseadas
 - Eliminar contaminación
 - Plantar en campos (deben existir bloques para plantar)
 - Eliminar estructuras y obstáculos

Si se marca la opción {0}, solo se examinarán los bloques suerficiales; si no, también se examinarán los bloques que estén a una profundidad máxima de {1} bloques por debajo del bloque más alto.

trans-unit.id: Add blocks from the property at {0} until there are more than {1}.
trans-unit.source: Add blocks from the property at {0} until there are more than {1}.
trans-unit.target: Añade bloques de la propiedad en {0} hasta que haya más de {1}.

trans-unit.id: Web Server Url. If not specified then remote IP address will be used. Usually you should ignore it, but if you want to use DNS name or hide web server behind a proxy (for SSL or friendly name) then it may be useful. Uses default port if not explicit port specified (HTTP - 80, HTTPS - 443). Format: http(s)://my.server[:port].
trans-unit.source: Web Server Url. If not specified then remote IP address will be used. Usually you should ignore it, but if you want to use DNS name or hide web server behind a proxy (for SSL or friendly name) then it may be useful. Uses default port if not explicit port specified (HTTP - 80, HTTPS - 443). Format: http(s)://my.server[:port].
trans-unit.target: Servidor Web Url. Si no se especifica, se utilizará la dirección IP remota. Normalmente debería ignorarlo, pero si desea utilizar un nombre DNS u ocultar un servidor web detrás de un proxy (para SSL o un nombre amigable), entonces puede ser útil. Utiliza el puerto predeterminado si no se especifica un puerto explícito (HTTP - 80, HTTPS - 443). Formato: http(s)://my.server[:port].

trans-unit.id: A string describing when this server typically has active players. Each character represents an hour, starting from Monday 12am. 0 is 'Rarely', 1 is 'Sometimes', 2 is 'Usually'. This is automatically set when a client starts the server directly, but can also be set manually. Time must be specified in GMT! Easiest way to get this string is copy playtime.eco in the settings folder after creating it by running the Eco client.
trans-unit.source: A string describing when this server typically has active players. Each character represents an hour, starting from Monday 12am. 0 is 'Rarely', 1 is 'Sometimes', 2 is 'Usually'. This is automatically set when a client starts the server directly, but can also be set manually. Time must be specified in GMT! Easiest way to get this string is copy playtime.eco in the settings folder after creating it by running the Eco client.
trans-unit.target: Una hilo describe cuando este servidor normalmente tiene jugadores activos. Cada carácter representa una hora, a partir de las 12:00 horas del lunes. 0 es 'Rara vez', 1 es 'A veces', 2 es 'Normalmente'. Esto se establece automáticamente cuando un cliente inicia el servidor directamente, pero también se puede establecer manualmente. La hora debe ser especificada en GMT! La forma más fácil de obtener este hilo es copiar playtime.eco en la carpeta de configuración después de crearla ejecutando el cliente Eco.

trans-unit.id: Changes the distance at which game objects are rendered.\n\nPerformance impact: High
trans-unit.source: Changes the distance at which game objects are rendered.\n\nPerformance impact: High
trans-unit.target: Cambia la distancia a la que se renderizan los objetos.\n\nImpacto en el rendimiento: alto

trans-unit.id: Determines actual interface size.\n\nPerformance impact: None
trans-unit.source: Determines actual interface size.\n\nPerformance impact: None
trans-unit.target: Determina el tamaño real de la interfaz.\n\nImpacto en el rendimiento: ninguno

trans-unit.id: Determines how bright the final picture is.\n\nPerformance impact: None
trans-unit.source: Determines how bright the final picture is.\n\nPerformance impact: None
trans-unit.target: Determina el nivel de brillo final del juego.\n\nImpacto en el rendimiento: Ninguno

trans-unit.id: Antialiasing aims to cut down on the pixellated, jagged edges you see in the game and helps to smooth out objects when you can't increase the resolution any further.\n\nPerformance impact: High
trans-unit.source: Antialiasing aims to cut down on the pixellated, jagged edges you see in the game and helps to smooth out objects when you can't increase the resolution any further.\n\nPerformance impact: High
trans-unit.target: El antialiasing intenta disminuir los bordes pixeleados y ásperos que ves en el juego y ayuda a suavizar los objetos cuando no puedes aumentar más la resolución.\n\nImpacto en el Rendimiento: Alto

trans-unit.id: Shadow quality determines how good shadows look in game.\n\nPerformance impact: Average
trans-unit.source: Shadow quality determines how good shadows look in game.\n\nPerformance impact: Average
trans-unit.target: La calidad de sombras determina la calidad gráfica de las sombras en el juego.\n\nImpacto en el Desempeño: Medio

trans-unit.id: Render scale lets you use a 'lower resolution' while technically keeping your native resolution going. Playing at a 75% render scale will lower the load on your GPU as if it was a lower resolution while still displaying it in the proper, native resolution to avoid the blurry image.\n\nPerformance impact: High
trans-unit.source: Render scale lets you use a 'lower resolution' while technically keeping your native resolution going. Playing at a 75% render scale will lower the load on your GPU as if it was a lower resolution while still displaying it in the proper, native resolution to avoid the blurry image.\n\nPerformance impact: High
trans-unit.target: La escala de renderizado permite utilizar una 'resolución menor' mientras que técnicamente se mantiene la resolución nativa. Jugar con una escala de renderizado al 75% disminuirá la carga sobre el GPU al nivel de una resolución menor mientras que el juego se despliega en la resolución nativa adecuada, evitando imágenes borrosas.\n\nImpacto en el Desempeño: Alto

trans-unit.id: Enabling VSync tells your graphics card to synchronize its actions with your monitor. That means the graphics card is only allowed to render things to the monitor when the monitor says it is ready to repaint a new screen.\n\nPerformance impact: Average
trans-unit.source: Enabling VSync tells your graphics card to synchronize its actions with your monitor. That means the graphics card is only allowed to render things to the monitor when the monitor says it is ready to repaint a new screen.\n\nPerformance impact: Average
trans-unit.target: Habilitar VSync hace que la tarjeta gráfica sincronice sus acciones con el monitor. Es decir, que la tarjeta gráfica solamente puede crear imágenes cuando el monitor indique que está listo para actualizar la pantalla.\n\nImpacto en el Desempeño: Medio

trans-unit.id: Charred agave leaves are too fiberous to eat entirely, but you can certainly chew them.
trans-unit.source: Charred agave leaves are too fiberous to eat entirely, but you can certainly chew them.
trans-unit.target: Las hojas de agave carbonizadas son demasiado fibrosas para comerlas en su totalidad, pero al menos podrás masticarlas.

trans-unit.id: A rock of varying hardness, useful for construction and as a host for iron ore. Sandstone is a sedimentary rock that forms when sand is buried deeply enough to lithify. Sometimes the shapes of dunes and ripples from an ancient desert or beach are preserved!
trans-unit.source: A rock of varying hardness, useful for construction and as a host for iron ore. Sandstone is a sedimentary rock that forms when sand is buried deeply enough to lithify. Sometimes the shapes of dunes and ripples from an ancient desert or beach are preserved!
trans-unit.target: Roca de dureza variable usada para la construcción, y que también puede encontrarse mezclada con mineral de hierro. La arenisca es una roca sedimentaria que se forma cuando la arena se encuentra a grandes profundidades y se litifica. ¡A veces incluso conserva la forma de las dunas y las ondas de los desiertos antiguos o las playas de las que provienen!

trans-unit.id: A composite lumber made from a combination of wood and plastic.

trans-unit.target: Madera compuesta de una combinación de madera y plástico.

trans-unit.id: Allows the creation of Demographics, which specify groups of citizens automatically based on criteria you define.

trans-unit.id: Allows the creation of Election Processes, which are different kinds of elections with different settings (who can vote, who can veto, etc).

trans-unit.target: Te permite la creación de mapas de distritos, con los que podrás definir conjuntos de distritos que podrán incluirse en leyes y otras acciones cívicas.

trans-unit.target: Permite la creación de un gobierno, con el cual pueden crearse objetos cívicos.

trans-unit.target: La cláusula anidada falló porque al menos una de las subcláusulas se logró:\n\n{0}

trans-unit.id: This clause allows players to define in words what they would like done. When using this clause, the contract can no longer be auto-approved, and the client will have to approve it before accepting it. When accepting a contract with a custom clause, it is wise to first review the reputation of the citizen offering it, because it is fully at their discretion to approve or deny its completion.\n\nYou must uncheck {0} at the bottom of the contract to use this clause.
trans-unit.source: This clause allows players to define in words what they would like done. When using this clause, the contract can no longer be auto-approved, and the client will have to approve it before accepting it. When accepting a contract with a custom clause, it is wise to first review the reputation of the citizen offering it, because it is fully at their discretion to approve or deny its completion.\n\nYou must uncheck {0} at the bottom of the contract to use this clause.
trans-unit.target: Esta cláusula permite a los jugadores definir con palabras las acciones que se requieren. Al emplearla, el contrano no puede ser aprobado automáticamente y el cliente tendrá que aprobarlo antes de aceptarlo. Si aceptas un contrato con una cláusula personalizada, se recomienda que eches un vistazo primero a la reputación del ciudadano que lo ofrece, ya que ellos serán los que aprueben o denieguen su terminación.\n\nDebes desmarcar {0} en la parte inferior del contrato para usar esta cláusula.

trans-unit.source:
Steam initialization failed with message: {0}

You can also may try to close all other Steam apps and restart client
or login with SLG account.

Fallo en el inicio de Steam. Mensaje: {0}
Podría estar relacionado con uno de los problemas descritos en: https://partner.steamgames.com/doc/sdk/api#initialization_and_shutdown
También puedes probar a cerrar todas las apps relacionadas con Steam y reiniciar el cliente
o iniciar sesión con una cuenta de SLG.

trans-unit.id: Contributions to this part of the work will be multiplied by the given weight. For example, if the labor is set to '2' weight while ingredients are set to '1', then labor will count for double payment compared to what the ingredients are paid.
trans-unit.source: Contributions to this part of the work will be multiplied by the given weight. For example, if the labor is set to '2' weight while ingredients are set to '1', then labor will count for double payment compared to what the ingredients are paid.
trans-unit.target: Las contribuciones a esta parte del trabajo se multiplicarán por el grado de importancia definido. Por ejemplo, si el trabajo se define con '2' de importancia, mientras que los ingredientes se definen como '1', el trabajo te recompensará con el doble de pago en comparación con lo que ganarías solo por los ingredientes.

trans-unit.id: Remote address which should be used to access the server. If not specified then will be automatically detected. Usually you should ignore it, but if you want to set exact connection address then it may be useful. Uses GameServerPort if no explicit port specified. If you want to auto-discovery remote address then you can use '*' instead of remote_host. Format: remote_host[:port] or *[:port].
trans-unit.source: Remote address which should be used to access the server. If not specified then will be automatically detected. Usually you should ignore it, but if you want to set exact connection address then it may be useful. Uses GameServerPort if no explicit port specified. If you want to auto-discovery remote address then you can use '*' instead of remote_host. Format: remote_host[:port] or *[:port].
trans-unit.target: Dirección remota mediante la cual se podrá acceder al servidor. Si no se define ninguna, se detectará automáticamente. Generalmente puede ser ignorada, pero si se quiere ajustar una conexión exacta, esta opción es muy útil. Usa GameServerPort si no se especifica un puerto. Si quieres realizar una detección automática de dirección, escribe '*' en lugar de remote_host. Formato: remote_host[:port] o *[:port].

trans-unit.id: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is too high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create lot of extra blocks and significantly slow down generation. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.source: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is too high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create lot of extra blocks and significantly slow down generation. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.target: ¡La velocidad de generación ({1:E2}) de DepositTerrainModule ({0}) es demasiado alta! Si sigues con este ajuste, ¡creará un depósito nuevo cada {2}, con un tamaño máximo de depósito de {3}! Al hacerlo, creará demasiados bloques adicionales, disminuyendo la generación significativamente. Para corregir este problema, disminuye la velocidad de generación hasta, por lo menos, {4:E2} (para obtener un 20 % de espacio entre depósitos).

trans-unit.id: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create too tight deposits. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.source: DepositTerrainModule ({0}) spawn rate ({1:E2}) is high! It will create new deposit every {2} blocks with max deposit size {3}! It may create too tight deposits. To fix this decrease spawn rate at least to {4:E2} (for 20% space between deposits).
trans-unit.target: La velocidad de generación ({1:E2}) de DepositTerrainModule ({0}) es alta. Si sigues con este ajuste, ¡creará un depósito nuevo cada {2}, con un tamaño máximo de depósito de {3}! Esto podría hacer que los depósitos estuvieran demasiado juntos. Para corregir este problema, disminuye la velocidad de generación hasta, por lo menos, {4:E2} (para obtener un 20 % de espacio entre depósitos).

trans-unit.id: Defines depth range to start spawn in. It may go out of depth range while growing deposit though. You can use DepositDepthRange to control deposit bounds.
trans-unit.source: Defines depth range to start spawn in. It may go out of depth range while growing deposit though. You can use DepositDepthRange to control deposit bounds.
trans-unit.target: Define el intervalo de profundidad en el que comenzar la generación. Si el depósito crece, podría exceder dicho intervalo. Puedes usar DepositDepthRange para controlar los límites del depósito.

trans-unit.id: Defines depth range to keep deposit within. It is still possible to go out of deposit depth range bounds, but it will have big penalty.
trans-unit.source: Defines depth range to keep deposit within. It is still possible to go out of deposit depth range bounds, but it will have big penalty.
trans-unit.target: Define el intervalo de profundidad en el que quieres contener el depósito. Si el depósito crece, podría exceder dicho intervalo, pero se aplicaría una penalización considerable.

trans-unit.id: When you gotta go, you gotta go.
trans-unit.source: When you gotta go, you gotta go.
trans-unit.target: Si hay que ir, se va.

trans-unit.id: A crushing machine that uses iron stamps to pound rocks into small pieces.
trans-unit.source: A crushing machine that uses iron stamps to pound rocks into small pieces.
trans-unit.target: Máquina trituradora que usa prensas de hierro para machacar las rocas y generar trozos pequeños.
Puerta pesada de piedra con mortero.

trans-unit.id: A heavy duty machine that uses compressive force to crush rocks into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: A heavy duty machine that uses compressive force to crush rocks into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Máquina pesada que usa fuerza de compresión para triturar rocas y convertirlas en polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Elected officials can perform one-time executive actions here.
trans-unit.source: Elected officials can perform one-time executive actions here.
trans-unit.target: Los oficiales electos podrán realizar acciones ejecutivas únicas aquí.

trans-unit.id: A tamper proof box where votes are cast. Citizens can run for elected office here.
trans-unit.source: A tamper proof box where votes are cast. Citizens can run for elected office here.
trans-unit.target: Una caja sellada donde se colocan los votos. Aquí es donde los ciudadanos podrán presentarse a una oficina determinada.

trans-unit.id: Tailorings work with cloth to make high-end furniture.and clothing that provides special bonuses when worn.
trans-unit.source: Tailorings work with cloth to make high-end furniture.and clothing that provides special bonuses when worn.
trans-unit.target: Los sastres podrán trabajar con tela y fabricar muebles de alta categoría, además de ropa que concede bonificaciones especiales al llevarla puesta.

trans-unit.id: Smiths smelt concentrate ore into metal bars and craft superior tools that helps citizens work more productively.
trans-unit.source: Smiths smelt concentrate ore into metal bars and craft superior tools that helps citizens work more productively.
trans-unit.target: Los herreros funden minerales concentrados y los convierten en lingotes de metal, además de fabricar herramientas superiores que ayudan a los ciudadanos a trabajar de manera más productiva.

trans-unit.id: Hunting animals provides a great source of nutritious food and their skins can be used in a variety of crafting projects.
trans-unit.source: Hunting animals provides a great source of nutritious food and their skins can be used in a variety of crafting projects.
trans-unit.target: Cazar animales proporciona una gran fuente de comida, y sus pieles también pueden aprovecharse para diversos proyectos.

trans-unit.id: Farmers specialize in all aspects of agriculture. The crops they produce are a primary source of the calories needed to perform work.
trans-unit.source: Farmers specialize in all aspects of agriculture. The crops they produce are a primary source of the calories needed to perform work.
trans-unit.target: Los granjeros se especializan en todos los campos relacionados con la agricultura. Sus cultivos son la fuente principal de calorías para que cualquier jugador pueda trabajar.

trans-unit.id: Engineers use the materials created by other professions to create cutting edge technology that paves the way for technological advancement.
trans-unit.source: Engineers use the materials created by other professions to create cutting edge technology that paves the way for technological advancement.
trans-unit.target: Los ingenieros usan los materiales creados por otros profesionales para descubrir nuevas tecnologías, facilitando el avance de la sociedad.

trans-unit.id: Cannot post a contract on an unplaced board.
trans-unit.source: Cannot post a contract on an unplaced board.
trans-unit.target: No se puede colgar un contrato en un tablero de contratación no colocado.

trans-unit.id: Carpenters use harvested logs to craft a variety of useful products. Wood is an excellent source of building materials and furniture for homes.
trans-unit.source: Carpenters use harvested logs to craft a variety of useful products. Wood is an excellent source of building materials and furniture for homes.
trans-unit.target: Los carpinteros usan los troncos recogidos tras talar para crear una gran variedad de productos útiles. La madera es un recurso excepcional para construir y amueblar un hogar.

trans-unit.id: Teleports player A to player B
trans-unit.source: Teleports player A to player B

trans-unit.id: A metal sign that is especially useful when placed alongside a road to provide information or give instructions to road users.
trans-unit.source: A metal sign that is especially useful when placed alongside a road to provide information or give instructions to road users.
trans-unit.target: Letrero de metal especialmente útil para colocar junto a una carretera con información para los conductores.

trans-unit.id: A traffic sign used to notify drivers to come to a complete stop and make sure the interesection is clear before proceeding.
trans-unit.source: A traffic sign used to notify drivers to come to a complete stop and make sure the interesection is clear before proceeding.
trans-unit.target: Señal de tráfico usada para notificar a los usuarios de que deben detenerse completamente para asegurarse de que el cruce está despejado antes de proseguir.

trans-unit.id: An early stone table. Not much to look at but it does the job.
trans-unit.source: An early stone table. Not much to look at but it does the job.
trans-unit.target: Mesa de piedra tosca. No es demasiado detallada, pero cumple con su función.

trans-unit.id: A basic stone fireplace. Not much to look at it but a great source of heat.
trans-unit.source: A basic stone fireplace. Not much to look at it but a great source of heat.
trans-unit.target: Chimenea básica de piedra. No tiene demasiados detalles, pero es una fuente de calor funcional.

trans-unit.id: An early stone chair. Not too comfy but it does the job.
trans-unit.source: An early stone chair. Not too comfy but it does the job.
trans-unit.target: Silla de piedra tosca. No es demasiado cómoda, pero cumple con su función.

trans-unit.id: A basic stone bench for sitting.

trans-unit.source: A trap to catch river fish as they swim. It can only be used in fresh water as it's too small to catch the larger ocean fish.

trans-unit.id: A nice composite table for eating meals or getting some work done.

trans-unit.target: Chimenea rústica hecha con ladrillos. No hay nada mejor que sentarse alrededor de un buen fuego en un día frío.

trans-unit.source: An extra fatty leavened dough for making yummy pastries.
trans-unit.target: Masa fermentada y con aceite, empleada para preparar ricas recetas de repostería.

trans-unit.id: Leavened dough with added yeast that rises when baked.
trans-unit.source: Leavened dough with added yeast that rises when baked.
trans-unit.target: Masa con levadura que elevará al ser horneada.

trans-unit.id: Blackened taro root. Not the tastiest meal, but a great source of energy for early rainforest settlers.
trans-unit.source: Blackened taro root. Not the tastiest meal, but a great source of energy for early rainforest settlers.
trans-unit.target: Raíz de taro ennegrecida. No es la mejor de las comidas, pero sigue conteniendo muchos nutrientes para los colonos primerizos de las selvas.

trans-unit.id: Pineapple that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.source: Pineapple that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.target: Piña carbonizada en una fogata sencilla.

trans-unit.id: Papaya fruit that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.source: Papaya fruit that has been charred over a basic campfire.
trans-unit.target: Papaya carbonizada en una fogata sencilla.

trans-unit.id: A collection of charred mushrooms. Cooking mushrooms properly can remove some of the toxins.
trans-unit.source: A collection of charred mushrooms. Cooking mushrooms properly can remove some of the toxins.
trans-unit.target: Colección de champiñones carbonizados. Al cocinarlos adecuadamente, podrás eliminar algunas de las toxinas de estos hongos.

trans-unit.id: Heart of palm collected fom fallen pineapple trees that have been charred over a campfire.
trans-unit.source: Heart of palm collected fom fallen pineapple trees that have been charred over a campfire.
trans-unit.target: Palmito recogido de árboles de la piña caídos y que han sido carbonizados en una fogata.

trans-unit.id: Blackened cactus fruit. A favorite of early desert settlers.
trans-unit.source: Blackened cactus fruit. A favorite of early desert settlers.
trans-unit.target: Fruto ennegrecida del cactus, y la favorita de los primeros colonos del desierto.

trans-unit.id: A mushy mixture that can serve somewhat as a replacement protein in a meatless diet.
trans-unit.source: A mushy mixture that can serve somewhat as a replacement protein in a meatless diet.
trans-unit.target: Una mezcla pastosa que puede servir un poco como proteína de reemplazo en una dieta sin carne.

trans-unit.id: Agave leaves that have been charred over a campfire
trans-unit.source: Agave leaves that have been charred over a campfire
trans-unit.target: Hojas de agave carbonizadas en una fogata.

trans-unit.id: Baked tomatoes might not look as red or plump as the raw variety, but they are nice and tasty.
trans-unit.source: Baked tomatoes might not look as red or plump as the raw variety, but they are nice and tasty.
trans-unit.target: Los tomates horneados puede que no tengan un aspecto rojizo o abundante como su variedad cruda, pero son agradables y sabrosos.

trans-unit.id: Baked meat is less fatty than other methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked meat is less fatty than other methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Carne horneada y con menos grasa que empleando otros métodos.

trans-unit.id: Baked heart of palm that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked heart of palm that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Palmito horneado, que conservan más nutrientes que al cocinarlos con métodos más simples.

trans-unit.id: Baked corn that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked corn that retains more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Maíz horneado, conservando más nutrientes que al cocinarlo con métodos más simples.

trans-unit.id: Baked beets that retain more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.source: Baked beets that retain more nutrients than more simple methods of cooking.
trans-unit.target: Remolachas horneadas, que conservan más nutrientes que al cocinarlas con métodos más simples.

trans-unit.id: The succulent leaves of the agave plant can be cooked to make a nice meal.
trans-unit.source: The succulent leaves of the agave plant can be cooked to make a nice meal.
trans-unit.target: Las suculentas hojas del agave pueden cocinarse para crear una comida deliciosa.

trans-unit.id: Wood pulp and dirt make a great filler for other fertilizers.
trans-unit.source: Wood pulp and dirt make a great filler for other fertilizers.
trans-unit.target: La pulpa de madera y la tierra son rellenos útiles para el uso de otros fertilizantes.

trans-unit.id: Phosphate fertilizer is a great source of Phosphorus.
trans-unit.source: Phosphate fertilizer is a great source of Phosphorus.
trans-unit.target: El fertilizante con fosfatos es una gran fuente de fósforo.

trans-unit.id: A fertilize made from fur pelts and filler.
trans-unit.source: A fertilize made from fur pelts and filler.
trans-unit.target: Fertilizante creado con una mezcla de pelaje animal y relleno.

trans-unit.id: A fertilizer made from hide ash and fillers.
trans-unit.source: A fertilizer made from hide ash and fillers.
trans-unit.target: Fertilizante creado con una mezcla de cenizas de piel animal y rellenos.

trans-unit.id: A filler ingredient used in a variety of fertilizers.
trans-unit.source: A filler ingredient used in a variety of fertilizers.
trans-unit.target: Ingrediente usado para la preparación de fertilizantes.

trans-unit.id: Compost fertilizer is a classic, low effort fertilizer.
trans-unit.source: Compost fertilizer is a classic, low effort fertilizer.
trans-unit.target: El fertilizante de compost es de los más clásicos y de los que menos exige para su preparación.

trans-unit.id: Camas ash fertilizer, though not very potent, is a great source of potassium.
trans-unit.source: Camas ash fertilizer, though not very potent, is a great source of potassium.
trans-unit.target: Fertilizante de cenizas de camasia. Aunque no es muy potente, es una buena fuente de potasio.

trans-unit.id: Blood meal is a great source of nitrogen.
trans-unit.source: Blood meal is a great source of nitrogen.
trans-unit.target: La gastronomía con sangre proporciona alimentos con mucho nitrógeno.

trans-unit.id: Spruce log is a type of softwood, sometimes referred to as whitewood.
trans-unit.source: Spruce log is a type of softwood, sometimes referred to as whitewood.
trans-unit.target: El tronco de pícea es de un tipo de madera blanda, a veces también conocida como 'madera blanca'.

trans-unit.id: Saguaro rib is a basic, lightweight wood harvested from the saguaro cactus.
trans-unit.source: Saguaro rib is a basic, lightweight wood harvested from the saguaro cactus.
trans-unit.target: La nervadura de saguaro es un tipo de madera ligera y sencilla que se obtiene del saguaro.

trans-unit.id: Redwood log is a type of softwood that can be easily identified by its distinct red bark.
trans-unit.source: Redwood log is a type of softwood that can be easily identified by its distinct red bark.
trans-unit.target: El tronco de secuoya es de un tipo de madera blanda, fácilmente identificable por su corteza roja distintiva.

trans-unit.id: Oak log is a type of hardwood. With its great strength and hardness, oak is commonly used for furniture and building materials.
trans-unit.source: Oak log is a type of hardwood. With its great strength and hardness, oak is commonly used for furniture and building materials.
trans-unit.target: La madera de roble es un tipo de madera noble. Su fuerza y dureza hacen que el roble se use normalmente para crear muebles y materiales de construcción.

trans-unit.id: Iron ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Iron ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Mineral de hierro que se ha concentrado para eliminar impurezas. El concentrado de un mineral es usado por los herreros para crear barras de metal.

trans-unit.id: Gold ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Gold ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Mineral de oro que se ha concentrado para eliminar impurezas. El concentrado de un mineral es usado por los herreros para crear barras de metal.

trans-unit.id: Fir log is a type of softwood with a nice piney smell.
trans-unit.source: Fir log is a type of softwood with a nice piney smell.
trans-unit.target: El tronco de abeto es de un tipo de madera blanda que contiene un agradable olor a pino.

trans-unit.id: Slag that has been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Slag that has been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Escoria que se ha triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Shale rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Shale rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Rocas de pizarra que se han triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Sandstone rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Sandstone rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Rocas de arenisca que se han triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Limestone rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Limestone rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Rocas de piedra caliza que se han triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Crushed iron ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.source: Crushed iron ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.target: Hierro triturado y en un estado perfecto para ser concentrado.

trans-unit.id: Granite rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Granite rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Rocas de granito que se han triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Crushed gold ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.source: Crushed gold ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.target: Oro triturado y en un estado perfecto para ser concentrado.

trans-unit.id: Gneiss rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Gneiss rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Rocas de gneis que se han triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Crushed copper ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.source: Crushed copper ore that is ready to be concentrated.
trans-unit.target: Cobre triturado y en un estado perfecto para ser concentrado.

trans-unit.id: Basalt rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.source: Basalt rocks that have been crushed into a fine gravel.
trans-unit.target: Rocas de basalto que se han triturado hasta obtener un polvo fino.

trans-unit.id: Copper ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Copper ore that has been concentrated to remove impurities. Ore concentrate is used by smiths to smelt metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Mineral de cobre que se ha concentrado para eliminar impurezas. El concentrado de un mineral es usado por los herreros para crear barras de metal.

trans-unit.id: Ceiba log is a type of hardwood. The Ceiba tree, with its giant trunk, is often sought after by loggers for the large volume of logs it produces.
trans-unit.source: Ceiba log is a type of hardwood. The Ceiba tree, with its giant trunk, is often sought after by loggers for the large volume of logs it produces.
trans-unit.target: El tronco de ceiba es un tipo de madera noble que proviene del árbol de ceiba. Su gran tronco es muy codiciado por los leñadores profesionales por la cantidad de madera que pueden obtener de él.

trans-unit.id: Cedar log is a type of softwood. Cedar wood is a natural repellent to moths.
trans-unit.source: Cedar log is a type of softwood. Cedar wood is a natural repellent to moths.
trans-unit.target: El tronco de cedro es de un tipo de madera blanda, y es un repelente natural de las polillas.

trans-unit.id: Birch log is a type of hardwood, notable for its white and papery bark.
trans-unit.source: Birch log is a type of hardwood, notable for its white and papery bark.
trans-unit.target: La madera de abedul es un tipo de madera noble, reconocible por su corteza blanca y fina como el papel.

trans-unit.id: Ashlar is finely cut stone made by an expert mason. Ashlar stone is an especially decorative building material that comes in a variety of styles based on the type of rock used.
trans-unit.source: Ashlar is finely cut stone made by an expert mason. Ashlar stone is an especially decorative building material that comes in a variety of styles based on the type of rock used.
trans-unit.target: El sillar es la piedra tallada finamente por un mampostero experto. El sillar de piedra es un tipo de material decorativo creado con este tipo de piedra, y que puede tener varios estilos dependiendo de la roca empleada como base.

trans-unit.id: Used to construct buildings and pickup manmade objects.
trans-unit.source: Used to construct buildings and pickup manmade objects.
trans-unit.target: Se usa para construir edificios y cincelar objetos a partir de materiales creados por el hombre.

trans-unit.id: A wooden pole attached to a line and hook. Used to catch fish from rivers and the ocean.
trans-unit.source: A wooden pole attached to a line and hook. Used to catch fish from rivers and the ocean.
trans-unit.target: Palo de madera unido a una cuerda con un gancho. Se usa para capturar peces en los ríos y en el océano.

trans-unit.id: This log cannot be sliced any smaller
trans-unit.source: This log cannot be sliced any smaller
trans-unit.target: Este tronco no puede cortarse en trozos más pequeños

trans-unit.id: Dev object for testing air pollution.
trans-unit.source: Dev object for testing air pollution.
trans-unit.target: Objeto de desarrolladores para pruebas de polución aérea.

trans-unit.id: Water is an abundant resource. Fresh water can be found in rivers and lakes while salt water is found in the ocean. In addition to being a home to fish, water is needed for a variety of objects to function.
trans-unit.source: Water is an abundant resource. Fresh water can be found in rivers and lakes while salt water is found in the ocean. In addition to being a home to fish, water is needed for a variety of objects to function.
trans-unit.target: El agua es el recurso más abundante. El agua dulce se puede encontrar tanto en forma de ríos como de lagos, mientras que el agua salada forma parte de los océanos. Además de ser el hogar de peces, el agua también es necesaria para el funcionamiento de varios objetos.
Error: no se puede obtener el láser

trans-unit.source: Payment made as transferring knowledge. Must be creating a skillbook, or have the skillbook in your inventory at posting time.

trans-unit.id: Professions are groups of similar specialties. Players can focus on one profession or select specialties from a variety of professions.
trans-unit.source: Professions are groups of similar specialties. Players can focus on one profession or select specialties from a variety of professions.

trans-unit.id: Specialties unlock new unique abilities and crafting recipes. New specialties can be gained by earning character experience.
trans-unit.source: Specialties unlock new unique abilities and crafting recipes. New specialties can be gained by earning character experience.
trans-unit.target: Las especialidades desbloquean habilidades y recetas de fabricación nuevas y únicas. Podrás elegir nuevas especialidades ganando experiencia de personaje.

trans-unit.id: Levels are gained in a specialty when using the skill, either by crafting related recipes or using tools that receive a bonus with the specialty.

trans-unit.id: You have been given {0} specialty points by {1}.
