trans-unit.id:
This clause allows you to restrict the acceptance of a contract to only those that have a reputation equal to or greater than the defined amount.

There are two kinds of reputation you can specify here: 
 - {0}, which is the sum of all player's ratings, multiplied by a network effect.
 - {1}, which is the sum of the opinions from players you have rated favorably (and who they have rated favorably, etc).

You can review the reputations of all players on the server through the citizen list, which displays players in reputation order, and displays reviews from other players in the reputation tooltip.
trans-unit.source:
This clause allows you to restrict the acceptance of a contract to only those that have a reputation equal to or greater than the defined amount.

There are two kinds of reputation you can specify here: 
 - {0}, which is the sum of all player's ratings, multiplied by a network effect.
 - {1}, which is the sum of the opinions from players you have rated favorably (and who they have rated favorably, etc).

You can review the reputations of all players on the server through the citizen list, which displays players in reputation order, and displays reviews from other players in the reputation tooltip.
trans-unit.target:
Esta cláusula te permite restringir la aceptación de un contrato a solo aquellos con una reputación igual o superior a la cantidad especificada.

Hay dos tipos de reputación que podrás especificar como parámetros: 
 - La {0}, que es el resultado de la suma de las votaciones de todos los jugadores, multiplicada por un valor asociado a la red.
 - La {1}, que es el resultado de ma suma de las opiniones de todos los jugadores por lo que has votado positivamente (y por lo que han votado positivamente).

Puedes revisar la reputación de todos los ciudadanos del servidor mediante la lista de jugadores, a la que puedes acceder para ver los jugadores en orden según su reputación y los comentario de otros jugadores (mediante la pantalla de descripción de reputación).

trans-unit.id:
Remove all tree stumps and debris from the property under the given marker.

The contractor will be temporarily rights to remove debris and stumps on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
Remove all tree stumps and debris from the property under the given marker.

The contractor will be temporarily rights to remove debris and stumps on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Elimina todos los tocones y restos de árboles de la propiedad bajo el marcador asignado.

El contratista recibirá privilegios temporales para eliminar los restos y los tocones de dicha propiedad.

Nota: puedes dividir la propiedad entre diferentes escrituras para un mejor control.

trans-unit.id: Remove all tree debris from property at {0}. Contractor will be given temporary permission to remove debris on property.
trans-unit.source: Remove all tree debris from property at {0}. Contractor will be given temporary permission to remove debris on property.
trans-unit.target: Elimina todos los restos de árboles de la propiedad en {0}. Se concederán permisos temporales al contratista para eliminar dichos restos de la citada propiedad.

trans-unit.id:
With this clause, the contractor must plow the given number of square meters of field into plantable soil.

The contractor will temporarily be given right to plow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
With this clause, the contractor must plow the given number of square meters of field into plantable soil.

The contractor will temporarily be given right to plow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Con esta cláusula, el contratista deberá arar el número dado de metros cuadrados de campo en tierra vegetal.

El contratado tendrá privilegios temporales para arar solo en la propiedad especificada.

Nota: puedes dividir una propiedad en diferentes escrituras para un mejor control del acceso.

trans-unit.id:
All grass tiles on specified property must be cut with a sickle or other mower. 

The contractor will temporarily be given the right to mow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
All grass tiles on specified property must be cut with a sickle or other mower. 

The contractor will temporarily be given the right to mow on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Todas las celdas con césped dentro de la propiedad especificada deberán ser segadas con una hoz o algún otro tipo de segadora.

El contratado tendrá privilegios temporales para acceder y segar la zona especificada en la propiedad.

Nota: puedes dividir una propiedad en diferentes escrituras para un mejor control del acceso.

trans-unit.id: Defines a container that must contain a set of objects. Both you and the contractor must have access rights on the selected container.\n\nYou can automatically give the contractor access rights to the container for the term of the contract with an additional {0} contract clause.
trans-unit.source: Defines a container that must contain a set of objects. Both you and the contractor must have access rights on the selected container.\n\nYou can automatically give the contractor access rights to the container for the term of the contract with an additional {0} contract clause.
trans-unit.target: Define un contenedor que debe tener un conjunto de objetos. Tanto tú como el contratista deben tener acceso a dicho contenedor.\n\nPuedes otorgar privilegios automáticamente al contratado para que acceda al contenedor mientras dure el contrato usando una cláusula adicional de {0}.

trans-unit.id:
All plants yielding the given types of resources must be harvested from this property, and placed into the specified container.

The contractor will temporarily be given rights to harvest on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.source:
All plants yielding the given types of resources must be harvested from this property, and placed into the specified container.

The contractor will temporarily be given rights to harvest on the specified property.

Note: You can split property into seperate deeds for more control.
trans-unit.target:
Se deberá recolectar el tipo de recursos especificados de las plantas que estén en esta propiedad, siendo posteriormente colocadas en el contenedor definido.

El cliente tendrá privilegios temporales para recolectar exclusivamente en dicha propiedad.

Nota: puedes dividir la propiedad implicada usando diferentes escrituras para un mejor control del acceso.

trans-unit.id: The type of range we're using. If 'counting back from present', we use the past X hours. If using 'current time block', we use the most recent block of time of that size (IE, if time range is 24 we would use only the current day, resetting at midnight).
trans-unit.source: The type of range we're using. If 'counting back from present', we use the past X hours. If using 'current time block', we use the most recent block of time of that size (IE, if time range is 24 we would use only the current day, resetting at midnight).
trans-unit.target: Tipo de intervalo empleado. Si se usa 'Del pasado al presente', se emplearán las últimas X horas. Si se usa 'Bloque de tiempo actual', se usara el bloque de tiempo más reciente del tamaño especificado (ejemplo: si el intervalo es de 24 h, se usará solo el día actual, reiniciándose a medianoche).

trans-unit.source: Note: when using 'Citizen Statistics' on this action, the returned value will be the sum of all pollution amounts over the requested period (not just a count of the pollution actions that occurred).

trans-unit.id: Determines whether overthrowing a government is allowed or not. If set, then a constitution with higher house value than the current can be ratified. Setting this to true also makes it impossible to make laws about placing/crafting a constitution.

trans-unit.id: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.source: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.target: Esta cláusula otorgará permisos a un cliente para acceder a un objeto o propiedad determinados. La duración de los privilegios puede ser temporal o permanente. Este permiso puede concederse tanto al inicio como al final del contrato.\n\nSi necesitas que un jugador entregue un producto en un contenedor privado o construir algo en la parcela privada de otro jugador, usa estos ajustes para que puedan acceder sin problemas. Los jugadores que acepten un contrato deben siempre asegurarse de que tienen los permisos adecuados para completarlo con éxito.

trans-unit.id: This clause provides a payment, with the option of collecting a deposit from the contractor.\n\nDeposits and payments are held in escrow for the duration of the contract. The amount in escrow is given to the contractor if the contract is successfully completed, or it goes to the client if the contract is marked as failed.
trans-unit.source: This clause provides a payment, with the option of collecting a deposit from the contractor.\n\nDeposits and payments are held in escrow for the duration of the contract. The amount in escrow is given to the contractor if the contract is successfully completed, or it goes to the client if the contract is marked as failed.
trans-unit.target: Esta cláusula te permite acceder a un pago, con opción a reclamar también un depósito al contratante.\n\nLos depósitos y los pagos se mantienen en un fideicomiso mientras dure el contrato. La cantidad ingresada en el mismo se devolverá al contratante si se completa el contrato, o no se devolverá al mismo si el contrato no se completa.

trans-unit.id: Air pollution output is divided by this to determine PPM. It depends on AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 and the world area. For 1km2 and pressure 1kg/m2, 1 ton = 1PPM (part per million), which is the unit that determines climate change effects.
trans-unit.source: Air pollution output is divided by this to determine PPM. It depends on AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 and the world area. For 1km2 and pressure 1kg/m2, 1 ton = 1PPM (part per million), which is the unit that determines climate change effects.
trans-unit.target: La generación de contaminación aérea se divide entre esta cantidad para determinar los ppm de contaminación. Este valor dependerá del parámetro AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 ('presión atmosférica en kg/m2') y el área del mundo. para 1 km2 de terreno y una presión de 1 kg/m2, 1 ton = 1 ppm (parte por millón), que es la unidad que determina los efectos en el cambio climático.

trans-unit.id: How much PPM (particles per million) will be added to/removed from atmosphere per one tone of matter (i.e. CO2).
trans-unit.source: How much PPM (particles per million) will be added to/removed from atmosphere per one tone of matter (i.e. CO2).
trans-unit.target: Cantidad que será añadida/eliminada a/de la atmósfera por tonelada de material empleado (por ejemplo, CO2) (en ppm).

trans-unit.id: Atmosphere pressure used in the atmosphere size formula. Trees absorb and pollution from tables produced in tons and converted to PPM by dividing on total atmosphere size. AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 where WorldAreaInM2 = (Dimensions.x * 10) * (Dimensions.y * 10). In example for 1km² (1000000m²) world with atmosphere pressure 1 kg/m² it will be 1000000 tons, resulting in 1 PPM per 1 ton of pollution or absorb (1 PPM = 1000000 * tons / AtmosphereSizeInTons), increasing pressure to 2 will result in 0.5 PPM per ton.
trans-unit.source: Atmosphere pressure used in the atmosphere size formula. Trees absorb and pollution from tables produced in tons and converted to PPM by dividing on total atmosphere size. AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 where WorldAreaInM2 = (Dimensions.x * 10) * (Dimensions.y * 10). In example for 1km² (1000000m²) world with atmosphere pressure 1 kg/m² it will be 1000000 tons, resulting in 1 PPM per 1 ton of pollution or absorb (1 PPM = 1000000 * tons / AtmosphereSizeInTons), increasing pressure to 2 will result in 0.5 PPM per ton.
trans-unit.target: Presión atmosférica usada en la fórmula del tamaño de atmósfera. Los árboles absorben cualquier fuente de contaminación de las tablas, expresada en toneladas y convertida a ppm al dividirla entre el tamaño total de la atmósfera. AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 where WorldAreaInM2 = (Dimensions.x * 10) * (Dimensions.y * 10). Por ejemplo, para un mundo de 1 km² (1000000 m²) con una presión atmosférica de 1 kg/m², se obtendrán 1000000 tons, es decir 1 ppm por ton de contaminación o absorción (1 ppm = 1000000 * tons / AtmosphereSizeInTons). Si aumentáramos la presión a 2, obtendríamos 0.5 ppm/ton.

trans-unit.id: Masons craft with stone and are a valuable source of building material and furniture. The ore they collect is used by smiths to smelt into metal bars.
trans-unit.source: Masons craft with stone and are a valuable source of building material and furniture. The ore they collect is used by smiths to smelt into metal bars.
trans-unit.target: Los mamposteros fabrican objetos con piedra, siendo una profesión muy valiosa para la creación de materiales para construcción y mobiliario. El mineral que consiguen puede pasarse a los herreros, que se encargarán de convertirlo en lingotes de metales.

trans-unit.id: Chefs create highly nutritious food using the raw food provided by hunters and farmers.
trans-unit.source: Chefs create highly nutritious food using the raw food provided by hunters and farmers.
trans-unit.target: Los grandes chefs crean comida altamente nutritiva usando la materia prima cruda obtenida de cazadores y granjeros.

trans-unit.id: Old growth redwood trees develop over centuries, with some living trees being over 2000 years old. Unlike most trees, these are a non-renewable resource and will not grow back if harvested.
trans-unit.source: Old growth redwood trees develop over centuries, with some living trees being over 2000 years old. Unlike most trees, these are a non-renewable resource and will not grow back if harvested.
trans-unit.target: Las secuoyas más antiguas pueden llegar a tener siglos (se sabe de algunos que incluso han llegado a los 2000 años de antigüedad). Al contrario que otros árboles, las secuoyas viejas no se renuevan y no podrán volver a crecer si las talas.

trans-unit.id: Cargo shorts that are ideal for exploring the great outdoors. More practical than elegant.
trans-unit.source: Cargo shorts that are ideal for exploring the great outdoors. More practical than elegant.
trans-unit.target: Los pantalones cortos de carga son ideales para explorar la inmensidad de los terrenos del mundo. Son muy prácticos, pero poco elegantes.

trans-unit.id: A sturdy pair of rubber footwear designed to provide protection against water, rain, and mud.
trans-unit.source: A sturdy pair of rubber footwear designed to provide protection against water, rain, and mud.
trans-unit.target: Calzado robusto de goma, diseñado para proteger los pies del agua, la lluvia y el barro.

trans-unit.id: A fashionable cloth belt that drapes across the waist.
trans-unit.source: A fashionable cloth belt that drapes across the waist.
trans-unit.target: Un cinturón de tela que puede colocarse alrededor de la cintura.

trans-unit.id: The description of this species that is displayed in the tooltip.
trans-unit.source: The description of this species that is displayed in the tooltip.
trans-unit.target: Descripción de esta especie que se muestra en la ventana de descripción.

trans-unit.id: These tags may be used for assigning advanced logic for organisms of this species.
trans-unit.source: These tags may be used for assigning advanced logic for organisms of this species.
trans-unit.target: Estas categorías pueden usarse para asignar lógica avanzada a los organismos de esta especie.

trans-unit.id: {0}. Type /? for a list of commands.
trans-unit.source: {0}. Type /? for a list of commands.
trans-unit.target: {0}. Escribe /? para ver una lista de todos los comandos.

trans-unit.source: No value assigned to the parameter '{0}'
trans-unit.target: No se ha asignado un valor al parámetro '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Contract not accepted: You do not have authorization on this contract board.
trans-unit.target: Contrato no aceptado. Motivo: no tienes autorización sobre este tablero de contratación.

trans-unit.id: It won't be possible to join this title with {0} max occupants.
trans-unit.source: It won't be possible to join this title with {0} max occupants.
trans-unit.target: No es posible unir este título con un máximo de {0} ocupantes.

trans-unit.id: Either executors or proposers must be set.
trans-unit.source: Either executors or proposers must be set.
trans-unit.target: Se deben establecer ejecutores o proponentes.

trans-unit.id: Endgame crafting cost presets for Laser and Computer Lab. Does not affect work orders in progress.
trans-unit.source: Endgame crafting cost presets for Laser and Computer Lab. Does not affect work orders in progress.
trans-unit.target: Ajustes para los costes de fabricación del láser y el laboratorio informático. No afectará a los pedidos en curso.

trans-unit.id: Can't get parent process with ID: {0}. Seems it already exited, shutting down. Error message: {1}
trans-unit.source: Can't get parent process with ID: {0}. Seems it already exited, shutting down. Error message: {1}
trans-unit.target: No se puede obtener el proceso parental con ID: {0}. Parece que se ha cerrado y se ha apagado. Mensaje de error: {1}

trans-unit.id: Enables a dot-like cursor on top of world objects for more accurate selection.
trans-unit.source: Enables a dot-like cursor on top of world objects for more accurate selection.
trans-unit.target: Activa un cursor en forma de punto al colocarte sobre objetos del mundo, que permite una selección más precisa.

trans-unit.id: In this mode you won't see any spiders in the game, but sometimes something strange may bite you. Be aware! To be fully applied you may need to re-login to the world.
trans-unit.source: In this mode you won't see any spiders in the game, but sometimes something strange may bite you. Be aware! To be fully applied you may need to re-login to the world.
trans-unit.target: En este modo, se eliminarán las arañas del juego. Sin embargo, de vez en cuando sufrirás la mordedura de alguna cosa. ¡Ten cuidado! Para aplicarlo al mundo, deberás reiniciar el juego.

trans-unit.id: Shows a box at the top of the screen listing what you're looking at.
trans-unit.source: Shows a box at the top of the screen listing what you're looking at.
trans-unit.target: Muestra un recuadro en la parte superior de la pantalla, indicándote a qué estás mirando.
Desactiva el movimiento de la cabeza al caminar.

trans-unit.id: Palm log comes from the palm tree, which is unique among trees that it is neither hardwood nor softwood. It still makes an excellent building material.
trans-unit.source: Palm log comes from the palm tree, which is unique among trees that it is neither hardwood nor softwood. It still makes an excellent building material.
trans-unit.target: El tronco de palmera proviene del árbol del mismo nombre, y destaca entre todos los árboles ya que no es de madera noble ni de madera blanda. Sin embargo, sigue siendo un material de construcción excelente.

trans-unit.id: Joshua log is a basic wood, harvested from the Joshua tree. Despite the name, Joshua trees are succulents and the building material they provide is neither hardwood nor softwood.
trans-unit.source: Joshua log is a basic wood, harvested from the Joshua tree. Despite the name, Joshua trees are succulents and the building material they provide is neither hardwood nor softwood.
trans-unit.target: El tronco del árbol de Josué es de madera básica. A pesar de su nombre, los árboles de Josué son suculentos y proporcionan un material de construcción que no puede clasificarse como madera noble ni como madera blanda.

trans-unit.id: Factors into experience per level for specialties.
trans-unit.source: Factors into experience per level for specialties.
trans-unit.target: Se convierte en EXP por nivel para las especialidades.

trans-unit.id: You must hold an elected title that grants the permissions 'Can Set Treasury Taxes' in order to tax players.
trans-unit.source: You must hold an elected title that grants the permissions 'Can Set Treasury Taxes' in order to tax players.
trans-unit.target: Debes tener un título electo con los permisos 'Establecer impuestos en la tesorería' para poder cobrar impuestos a los jugadores.

trans-unit.id: Identifier used to create the server's voice channel, keep secret.
trans-unit.source: Identifier used to create the server's voice channel, keep secret.
trans-unit.target: Identificador usado para crear el canal de voz del servidor. Mantenlo en secreto.

trans-unit.id: Controls the range within which a speaker’s audio remains at its original volume, and beyond which the loudness of the voice chat starts to fade out when heard.
trans-unit.source: Controls the range within which a speaker’s audio remains at its original volume, and beyond which the loudness of the voice chat starts to fade out when heard.
trans-unit.target: Controla el rango en el que el sonido de un altavoz se mantiene en su volumen de origen, y el volumen a partir del cual las voces del chat se atenuarán.

trans-unit.id: Specifies the formula or curve that controls the shape of how the audio fades between the ConversationalDistance and the AudibleDistance.
trans-unit.source: Specifies the formula or curve that controls the shape of how the audio fades between the ConversationalDistance and the AudibleDistance.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la fórmula o curva que controla la curva de atenuación del audio entre los valores dados por ConversationalDistance y AudibleDistance.

trans-unit.id: Controls the amplitude of the AudioFadeModel curve, which allows the attenuation of the voice chat loudness to become more or less extreme.
trans-unit.source: Controls the amplitude of the AudioFadeModel curve, which allows the attenuation of the voice chat loudness to become more or less extreme.
trans-unit.target: Controla la amplitud de la curva AudioFadeModel, que permite el control del volumen en las voces de chat para atenuarlo o aumentarlo.
Texto de información al tener éxito
Se puede nadar cerca de la costa
Puerta de piedra caliza con mortero

trans-unit.id: A heavy duty lumber platform that has been reinforced to allow extra storage for large items.
trans-unit.source: A heavy duty lumber platform that has been reinforced to allow extra storage for large items.
trans-unit.target: Plataforma industrial de troncos pesados reforzados para permitir el almacenamiento de objetos grandes.

trans-unit.id: An extra large lumber platform that has been reinforced to allow mass storage of items.
trans-unit.source: An extra large lumber platform that has been reinforced to allow mass storage of items.
trans-unit.target: Plataforma de troncos pesados reforzados de gran tamaño, usada para almacenamiento de grandes cantidades de objetos.

trans-unit.id: Can smite any block or world object.
trans-unit.source: Can smite any block or world object.
trans-unit.target: Podrá aplastar cualquier bloque u objeto del mundo.

trans-unit.id: Can be used as a hammer to place infinite amount of blocks.
trans-unit.source: Can be used as a hammer to place infinite amount of blocks.
trans-unit.target: Puede usarse como un martillo, permitiendo colocar una cantidad infinita de bloques.

trans-unit.id: Can ignore auth for different actions (storage, vehicles, blocks).
trans-unit.source: Can ignore auth for different actions (storage, vehicles, blocks).
trans-unit.target: Puede ignorar el acceso a diferentes acciones (almacenamiento, vehículos, bloques).

trans-unit.id: Flag which if set then won't decrease (distribute) the source value, but only will increase values in adjacent cells. Default: false.
trans-unit.source: Flag which if set then won't decrease (distribute) the source value, but only will increase values in adjacent cells. Default: false.
trans-unit.target: Marca que, al ser activada, no disminuirá (distribuirá) el valor de partida, solo aumentándolo en las celdas adyacentes. Por defecto: 'Falso'.

trans-unit.id: Does the animal float on surface?
trans-unit.source: Does the animal float on surface?

trans-unit.id: You are currently in the mute list and not allowed to use chat.
trans-unit.source: You are currently in the mute list and not allowed to use chat.
trans-unit.target: Actualmente estás en la lista de silenciados, por lo que no puedes usar el chat.

trans-unit.id: {0} doesn't have government banking privileges, but trying to create a Government Bank Account
trans-unit.source: {0} doesn't have government banking privileges, but trying to create a Government Bank Account
trans-unit.target: {0} no tiene privilegios bancarios del gobierno, pero está intentando crear una cuenta bancaria del gobierno
{0}: cantidad negativa de {1}, se ha cambiado el valor a 0.
Cuenta para el libro de contabilidad no definida.

trans-unit.id: Allows title holders to set bank accounts as 'government accounts', performed at a bank object when creating a new entry. This allows them to be the source/target of tax funds from laws, and prevents them from contributing to the account ownership or wealth total of any managers that are set on it.
trans-unit.source: Allows title holders to set bank accounts as 'government accounts', performed at a bank object when creating a new entry. This allows them to be the source/target of tax funds from laws, and prevents them from contributing to the account ownership or wealth total of any managers that are set on it.
trans-unit.target: Permite a los titulares definir cuentas bancarias como 'cuentas del gobierno', acción que podrás realizar en un objeto de banco al crear una nueva entrada. Esto permite que estas cuentas sean el origen/destino de los impuestos especificados en leyes, y previene su inclusión en las contribuciones a la riqueza total de sus administradores.

trans-unit.id: These can be hosted on this {0}.
trans-unit.source: These can be hosted on this {0}.

trans-unit.source: Lists the items that cannot be crafted from some set of other items. Note that many of these are not meant to be crafted, e.g. hips and stone.

trans-unit.id: Elections can have multiple 'provisions' added to them before voting starts. To add more, edit the civic object (law, demographic, etc) and attach it to this election. \n\nOnce an election is started, no more provisions can be added.
trans-unit.source: Elections can have multiple 'provisions' added to them before voting starts. To add more, edit the civic object (law, demographic, etc) and attach it to this election. \n\nOnce an election is started, no more provisions can be added.
trans-unit.target:
Se pueden añadir varias medidas a las elecciones antes de que comiencen las votaciones. 
 Para añadir más, edita el objeto cívico asociado (ley, demografía...) y crea una nueva medida para estas elecciones. 

Una vez que las elecciones comiencen, no se podrán añadir más medidas.

trans-unit.source: A large lumber table for eating meals or getting some work done.
trans-unit.target: Mesa de tablas de madera, útil para comer o para trabajar sobre ella.

trans-unit.id: A sturdy lumber chair. It doesn't feel as wobbly as more basic wooden chairs.
trans-unit.source: A sturdy lumber chair. It doesn't feel as wobbly as more basic wooden chairs.
trans-unit.target: Silla resistente hecha de troncos. No es tan endeble como las sillas de madera básica.

trans-unit.id: A lumber bench for when you need extra seating space than a traditional chair.
trans-unit.source: A lumber bench for when you need extra seating space than a traditional chair.
trans-unit.target: Banco de tablas de madera, con algo más de espacio que una silla tradicional.

trans-unit.id: A beautiful modern flat steel door with a large viewing window.
trans-unit.source: A beautiful modern flat steel door with a large viewing window.
trans-unit.target: Puerta de acero de buen diseño y aspecto moderno, con un gran ventanal.

trans-unit.id: An industrial elevator for transporting extra large loads vertically.
trans-unit.source: An industrial elevator for transporting extra large loads vertically.
trans-unit.target: Montacargas industrial para el transporte vertical de cargas de gran tamaño.

trans-unit.id: Harvested from a number of plants, these fibers are useful for a surprising number of things.
trans-unit.source: Harvested from a number of plants, these fibers are useful for a surprising number of things.
trans-unit.target: Cosechadas de varias plantas, estas fibras son útiles para un sorprendente número de cosas.

trans-unit.id: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2 to 5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
trans-unit.source: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2 to 5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
trans-unit.target: Una camisa Henley es una camisa de manga larga y sin cuello, caracterizada por tener una abertura de unos 8 a 13 cm de largo y con generalmente de 2 a 5 botones, debajo del cuello de corte redondo. En esencia, es como un polo sin cuello.

trans-unit.id: Healthy soil is essential to support life. When displaced, dirt can be used to terraform an area to support buildings and infrastructure.
trans-unit.source: Healthy soil is essential to support life. When displaced, dirt can be used to terraform an area to support buildings and infrastructure.
trans-unit.target: Una tierra sana es esencial para que pueda crecer vida en ella. La arena excavada del terreno se puede usar para terraformar una zona donde poder crear edificios e infraestructuras.

trans-unit.id: High quality sand is a sought after resource used for making glass and concrete. Though desert sand is abundant, it is not suitable for these materials.
trans-unit.source: High quality sand is a sought after resource used for making glass and concrete. Though desert sand is abundant, it is not suitable for these materials.
trans-unit.target: La arena de alta calidad es un recurso muy codiciado para fabricar vidrio y hormigón. La arena dura del desierto, aunque abundante, no sirve para crear estos materiales.

trans-unit.target: El servidor ha sufrido un error fatal del tipo "{0}", por lo que no puedes jugar más. Comprueba los registros en Eco_Data\\Server\\Logs para más información.

trans-unit.id: Failed to start the server. Exception was {0}
trans-unit.source: Failed to start the server. Exception was {0}

trans-unit.id: A pointed metal fastener used in crafting to attach pieces of material together.
trans-unit.source: A pointed metal fastener used in crafting to attach pieces of material together.
trans-unit.target: Pasador de metal afilado, usado para unir y mantener unidas dos piezas.

trans-unit.id: (No penalty for room count because of residents number: {0})
trans-unit.source: (No penalty for room count because of residents number: {0})
trans-unit.target: (sin penalización por número de cuartos debido al número de residentes: {0})
{0} el tipo de pago cambió de {1} a {2}.

trans-unit.id: If this entry is removed, then all the property that belongs it will be transferred to this backup owner. (Note: if this backup owner is invalid, then the property will become unowned.)
trans-unit.source: If this entry is removed, then all the property that belongs it will be transferred to this backup owner. (Note: if this backup owner is invalid, then the property will become unowned.)
trans-unit.target: Si se elimina esta entrada, todas las propiedades que pertenecen a ella se transferirán a su segundo dueño (aviso: si el segundo dueño no es un jugador válido, entonces la propiedad dejará de tener dueño).

trans-unit.id: {0} is outdated. All data was migrated to the new version.
trans-unit.source: {0} is outdated. All data was migrated to the new version.
trans-unit.target: {0} no ha sido actualizado. Todos los datos se han migrado a la nueva versión.

trans-unit.id: A game of Eco takes place over multiple days, with the world simulating even while offline. We can match you with the best worlds by finding servers that have similar playtimes.
trans-unit.source: A game of Eco takes place over multiple days, with the world simulating even while offline. We can match you with the best worlds by finding servers that have similar playtimes.
trans-unit.target: Una partida de Eco tiene lugar a lo largo de muchos días, manteniéndose la simulación del mundo incluso cuando estás desconectado. Podemos emparejarte con los mejores mundos encontrando servidores que tengan horarios de juego similares al tuyo.
Flecha abajo + retraer / flecha arriba + extender

trans-unit.id: Max hours a user can play per day. After their allotted time, they can still play but not expend calories with work. 0 means no limit.
trans-unit.source: Max hours a user can play per day. After their allotted time, they can still play but not expend calories with work. 0 means no limit.
trans-unit.target: Cantidad máxima de horas que un usuario puede jugar por día. Tras consumir su tiempo asignado, podrán seguir jugando pero no podrán gastar calorías en trabajo ("0" = sin límite de tiempo).

trans-unit.id: Only tax destinations are allowed (players with government banking privileges can create such bank accounts).
trans-unit.source: Only tax destinations are allowed (players with government banking privileges can create such bank accounts).
trans-unit.target: Solo se permiten destinos con impuestos (los jugadores con privilegios de banca gubernamental pueden crear tales cuentas bancarias).

trans-unit.id: The value must start with http:// or https://.
trans-unit.source: The value must start with http:// or https://.
trans-unit.target: El valor tiene que comenzar con http:// o https://.

trans-unit.id: Bind port for RCON traffic. TCP only. Requires a restart to take effect. More info available here: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
trans-unit.source: Bind port for RCON traffic. TCP only. Requires a restart to take effect. More info available here: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
trans-unit.target: Puerto de enlace para el tráfico RCON. Sólo TCP. Requiere un reinicio para que tenga efecto. Más información disponible aquí: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON

trans-unit.id: RCON IP Address for the traffic. If not specified then Any (0.0.0.0) address will be used. Requires a restart to take effect. More info available here: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
trans-unit.source: RCON IP Address for the traffic. If not specified then Any (0.0.0.0) address will be used. Requires a restart to take effect. More info available here: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
trans-unit.target: Dirección IP del RCON para el tráfico. Si no se especifica, se utilizará cualquier dirección (0.0.0.0). Requiere un reinicio para que tenga efecto. Más información disponible aquí: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON

trans-unit.id: Password for authenticating incoming RCON traffic. A password must be provided to enable RCON support. More info available here: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
trans-unit.source: Password for authenticating incoming RCON traffic. A password must be provided to enable RCON support. More info available here: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
trans-unit.target: Contraseña para autenticar el tráfico entrante de RCON. Se debe proporcionar una contraseña para habilitar el soporte de RCON. Más información disponible aquí: https://wiki.play.eco/en/RCON
Mult. por variedad de comida activado
Mult. por sabor de comida activado

trans-unit.id: Allows players to rent access to a given deed from one another when enabled.
trans-unit.source: Allows players to rent access to a given deed from one another when enabled.
trans-unit.target: Al activarse, permite a los jugadores crear alquileres para el acceso a una propiedad dada.

trans-unit.id: When enabled, the variety of food you eat will provide a bonus.
trans-unit.source: When enabled, the variety of food you eat will provide a bonus.
trans-unit.target: Al activarse, consumir comida variada te otorgará una bonificación.

trans-unit.id: When enabled, each player has unique preferences for each type of food that yields a bonus, and periodic 'cravings' will emerge for an additional bonus.
trans-unit.source: When enabled, each player has unique preferences for each type of food that yields a bonus, and periodic 'cravings' will emerge for an additional bonus.
trans-unit.target: Al activarse, cada jugador tendrá preferencias únicas por ciertos tipos de comida, los cuales proporcionarán una bonificación. Además, los jugadores tendrán ciertos "antojos" periódicos con los que ganar bonificaciones adicionales.
Faltan cadenas de caracteres localizadas que registran el comportamiento
Faltaron cadenas de caracteres que rastrean el comportamiento

trans-unit.id: Set education value (0 to 1) for a skill (default to 1), giving the skill if the user doesn't have it. If no target user is set, apply to self.
trans-unit.source: Set education value (0 to 1) for a skill (default to 1), giving the skill if the user doesn't have it. If no target user is set, apply to self.
trans-unit.target: Ajusta el valor de educación (de 0 a 1) en una habilidad (por defecto: 1), otorgando la habilidad si el usuario aún no la tiene. Si no se especifica un usuario, se aplica sobre el propio jugador.

trans-unit.id: Gives a skill matching the given name.
trans-unit.source: Gives a skill matching the given name.

trans-unit.id: Force global stats to collect now. Updates world progress stats as well.
trans-unit.source: Force global stats to collect now. Updates world progress stats as well.
trans-unit.target: Fuerza la recogida de estadísticas globales inmediatamente. También actualiza las estadísticas de progreso del mundo.

trans-unit.id: Optional amount charged upon move-in for new residents.

trans-unit.id: Provide a user with extra hours they can use to perform labor when exhauasted. Can be negative to remove previously granted energy.
trans-unit.source: Provide a user with extra hours they can use to perform labor when exhauasted. Can be negative to remove previously granted energy.
trans-unit.target: Otorga horas adicionales a un usuario cansado para que pueda seguir aportando trabajo. Puede tener un valor negativo, eliminando energía obtenida anteriormente.

trans-unit.id: Force a user to be exhausted for the remainder of the day.
trans-unit.source: Force a user to be exhausted for the remainder of the day.
trans-unit.target: Fuerza a que un usuario esté cansado el resto del día.

trans-unit.id: The user account associated with this server. This is public knowledge and shared with clients. Setting this will allow achievements earned by players on this server to be visible in other servers (as well as future features to come). Visti play.eco to link your steam account or create a new account.
trans-unit.source: The user account associated with this server. This is public knowledge and shared with clients. Setting this will allow achievements earned by players on this server to be visible in other servers (as well as future features to come). Visti play.eco to link your steam account or create a new account.
trans-unit.target: La cuenta de usuario asociada a este servidor. Esto es de conocimiento público y se comparte con los clientes. Si se establece esto, los logros obtenidos por los jugadores en este servidor serán visibles en otros servidores (así como las futuras características que vendrán). Visti play.eco para vincular tu cuenta de steam o crear una nueva cuenta.

trans-unit.id: Password for the above SLG account.

trans-unit.source: When enabled users who likely cheat movement will be identified and kicked from server (beta - may identify non-cheating users as cheaters and disconnect)

trans-unit.note: Chat command/Parameter for multiple chat commands

trans-unit.source: Force a craving on a given user (self if untargeted user, random food if not set)

Valores del juego para divisa y cantidad

trans-unit.id: Requirements that must be satisfied throughout the course. If the student fails to maintain these requirements, they will be expelled.
trans-unit.source: Requirements that must be satisfied throughout the course. If the student fails to maintain these requirements, they will be expelled.
trans-unit.target: Requisitos que deben cumplirse a lo largo del curso. Si los estudiantes no consiguen cumplir estos requisitos en todo momento, serán expulsados.

trans-unit.id: If set, students will be charged this amount upon enrollment, which will be held in Escrow until completion or unerollment, upon which it will be split with the teacher and the owner's bank account. Students that leave class before completion will have a prorated amount refunded. Students who have a partial education when joining will be charged a prorated tuition.
trans-unit.source: If set, students will be charged this amount upon enrollment, which will be held in Escrow until completion or unerollment, upon which it will be split with the teacher and the owner's bank account. Students that leave class before completion will have a prorated amount refunded. Students who have a partial education when joining will be charged a prorated tuition.
trans-unit.target: Si se establece, se cobrará a los estudiantes esta cantidad en el momento de la inscripción, que se mantendrá en depósito hasta la finalización o la anulación de la inscripción, tras lo cual se dividirá con el profesor y la cuenta bancaria del propietario. A los alumnos que abandonen las clases antes de finalizarlas se les devolverá una cantidad proporcional. A los alumnos que tengan una formación parcial al incorporarse se les cobrará una matrícula proporcional.

trans-unit.id: Requirements that must be satisfied throughout the course. If the teacher fails to maintain these requirements, they will be removed.
trans-unit.source: Requirements that must be satisfied throughout the course. If the teacher fails to maintain these requirements, they will be removed.
trans-unit.target: Requisitos que deben cumplirse a lo largo del curso. Si el profesor no mantiene estos requisitos, será eliminado.

trans-unit.id: Thie percentage of tuition will be paid to the teacher when a student finishes a course or unenrolls.
trans-unit.source: Thie percentage of tuition will be paid to the teacher when a student finishes a course or unenrolls.
trans-unit.target: Este porcentaje de la matrícula se pagará directamente al profesor cuando un estudiante complete un curso o salga de él.

trans-unit.id: Teaching will not begin until this many students are enrolled and have met the calorie requirements for studying. This is to limit the calorie expenditure of the teacher, which is the same regardless of the number of students being taught.
trans-unit.source: Teaching will not begin until this many students are enrolled and have met the calorie requirements for studying. This is to limit the calorie expenditure of the teacher, which is the same regardless of the number of students being taught.
trans-unit.target: No comenzará el proceso de educación hasta que se haya alcanzado este número de estudiantes y se cumplan los requisitos de calorías necesarios para estudiar. De esta manera, se optimiza el gasto de calorías del profesor, que es el mismo independientemente del número de estudiantes presentes.

trans-unit.id: Teaching requires labor, paid in advance in the form of calories. When students are enrolled and have studied, their queued 'study' calories and the teachers queued 'teaching' calories will tick down together, while their education rises.
trans-unit.source: Teaching requires labor, paid in advance in the form of calories. When students are enrolled and have studied, their queued 'study' calories and the teachers queued 'teaching' calories will tick down together, while their education rises.
trans-unit.target: La enseñanza requiere trabajo, pagado por adelantado en forma de calorías. Cuando los alumnos están inscriptos y han estudiado, sus calorías de "estudio" en cola y las calorías de "enseñanza" en cola de los profesores bajarán juntas, mientras su educación aumenta.

trans-unit.id: Only achievements earned on other servers this level of trust and up will be shown in the game.
trans-unit.source: Only achievements earned on other servers this level of trust and up will be shown in the game.
trans-unit.target: Solo se mostrarán en el juego los logros conseguidos en servidores de este o de mayor nivel de confianza.
Cambio total del nivel del mar
Sim del nivel del mar habilitado

trans-unit.id: Max Sea Level Rise Rate Per Day
trans-unit.source: Max Sea Level Rise Rate Per Day
trans-unit.target: Tasa máxima de aumento del nivel del mar por día
Cambio de temperatura máxima por día
Vel. base de mejora de habilidad
Historial de respaldos de capas por día
Reconstruir base de datos al salir

trans-unit.id: How old records can be grouped. It means it will try to process all last X days of records to group them. Usually you want to have this number low (1-2) in order to avoid process already processed records, but you can set high value (by example world age) in order to process at once all records from some old save with disabled grouping.
trans-unit.source: How old records can be grouped. It means it will try to process all last X days of records to group them. Usually you want to have this number low (1-2) in order to avoid process already processed records, but you can set high value (by example world age) in order to process at once all records from some old save with disabled grouping.
trans-unit.target: Cómo se pueden agrupar los registros antiguos. Significa que intentará procesar todos los registros de los últimos X días para agruparlos. Por lo general, usted quiere tener este número bajo (1-2) con el fin de evitar el proceso de los registros ya procesados, pero se puede establecer un valor alto (por ejemplo, la edad del mundo) con el fin de procesar a la vez todos los registros de algunos viejos guardar con la agrupación desactivada.

trans-unit.id: Max count of records that will be proccesed at once hourly. For reference, server with 100 players may reach 1.000.000 records per day. Usually 500.000 (default) should be ok, but you may want to tweak it if you have incredibly big count of records or if you are facing lag while it groups records.
trans-unit.source: Max count of records that will be proccesed at once hourly. For reference, server with 100 players may reach 1.000.000 records per day. Usually 500.000 (default) should be ok, but you may want to tweak it if you have incredibly big count of records or if you are facing lag while it groups records.
trans-unit.target: El número máximo de registros que se procesarán a la vez por hora. A modo de referencia, los servidores con 100 jugadores pueden alcanzar 1.000.000 de registros al día. Normalmente (por defecto), esto debería estar bien, pero es posible que desee cambiar esto si tiene un recuento de registros increíblemente grande o si experimenta retraso al agrupar los registros.

trans-unit.id: Most recent records wont be processed in order to have more exact values for laws like 'Users who in last 1 hour claimed plots ...'. You may want to tweak this value to increase this support.
trans-unit.source: Most recent records wont be processed in order to have more exact values for laws like 'Users who in last 1 hour claimed plots ...'. You may want to tweak this value to increase this support.
trans-unit.target: Los registros más recientes no se procesarán para tener valores más precisos para leyes como "Usuarios que en la última hora han reclamado lotes...". Es posible que desee ajustar este valor para aumentar esta ayuda.

trans-unit.id: It rebuilds database file at the moment of exiting the application. It may reduce space of stats file, but it will increase the time needed to exit.
trans-unit.source: It rebuilds database file at the moment of exiting the application. It may reduce space of stats file, but it will increase the time needed to exit.
trans-unit.target: Esto reconstruye el archivo de la base de datos en el momento en que se sale de la aplicación. Esto puede reducir el espacio del archivo de estadísticas, pero aumentará el tiempo necesario para salir.

trans-unit.id: Level of grouping data. Essential fields means only citizen, i.e, it may group action of 'drop rubble' and 'drop garbage' for same citizen. Currently othey fields are not used, so it should be good enough. But in the future there are may be another features with database, which may requiere another properties.
trans-unit.source: Level of grouping data. Essential fields means only citizen, i.e, it may group action of 'drop rubble' and 'drop garbage' for same citizen. Currently othey fields are not used, so it should be good enough. But in the future there are may be another features with database, which may requiere another properties.
trans-unit.target: Nivel de agrupación de datos. Los campos esenciales indican sólo a los ciudadanos, por ejemplo, podría agrupar la acción de "tirar escombros" y "tirar basura" para algunos ciudadanos. Actualmente los otros campos no se utilizan, por lo que debería ser bastante bueno. Pero en el futuro, puede haber otra funcionalidad con la base de datos, que puede requerir otras propiedades.

trans-unit.id: Radius of initial seed points. Influences cell size.

trans-unit.id: This transfer will be taxed as self directed because you have access to the target bank account.
trans-unit.source: This transfer will be taxed as self directed because you have access to the target bank account.
trans-unit.target: Esta transferencia se cobrará como si fuera dirigida a uno mismo, ya que tienes acceso a la cuenta bancaria del destinatario.

trans-unit.id: This transfer will be taxed as public directed because you don't have access to the target bank account.
trans-unit.source: This transfer will be taxed as public directed because you don't have access to the target bank account.
trans-unit.target: Esta transferencia se cobrará como si fuera una transferencia púbica, ya que no tienes acceso a la cuenta bancaria del destinatario.

trans-unit.id: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another player's account.
trans-unit.source: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another player's account.
trans-unit.target: Impuesto recaudado de los ciudadanos que transfieren divisas desde sus cuentas a las cuentas de otros jugadores.

trans-unit.id: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another account which they have access to. Generally tax rates on transfers between two accounts you both own is zero, but this tax rate can be set to prevent tax evasion by changing ownership of bank accounts after a transfer.
trans-unit.source: A tax taken from citizens that are transferring currency from their account to another account which they have access to. Generally tax rates on transfers between two accounts you both own is zero, but this tax rate can be set to prevent tax evasion by changing ownership of bank accounts after a transfer.
trans-unit.target: Es un impuesto que se cobra a los ciudadanos que transfieren divisas de su cuenta a otra a la que tienen acceso. Por lo general, el tipo impositivo sobre las transferencias entre dos cuentas de las que ambos son propietarios es cero, pero este tipo impositivo puede establecerse para evitar la evasión fiscal mediante el cambio de titularidad de las cuentas bancarias después de una transferencia.

trans-unit.id: A tax taken from citizens when using a currency exchange. Tax is charged as an extra cost to the customer, and the given percent is taken from both currencies in the transaction (thus you may want this to half of what you want the expected tax percent to be, since both are taxed).
trans-unit.source: A tax taken from citizens when using a currency exchange. Tax is charged as an extra cost to the customer, and the given percent is taken from both currencies in the transaction (thus you may want this to half of what you want the expected tax percent to be, since both are taxed).
trans-unit.target: Impuesto que se cobra a los ciudadanos cuando se utiliza un cambio de moneda. El impuesto se cobra como un costo extra al cliente, y el porcentaje dado se toma de ambas monedas en la transacción (por lo tanto, usted puede querer que esto sea la mitad de lo que quiere que sea el porcentaje de impuesto esperado, ya que ambos están gravados).

trans-unit.id: Injection detected. Please, stop using third-party software for code injections or you will be reported and permanently banned on all servers.
trans-unit.source: Injection detected. Please, stop using third-party software for code injections or you will be reported and permanently banned on all servers.
trans-unit.target: Inyección detectada. Por favor, deja de usar softwares de terceros para inyectar código o se informará sobre tu actividad y serás baneado en todos los servidores.

trans-unit.id: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment in the first person view.\n\nPerformance impact: None

trans-unit.target:
Extensión del mundo del juego observable que se ve en la pantalla en un momento dado en la vista en primera persona.


Impacto en el rendimiento: Ninguno

trans-unit.id: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment in the third person view. Bounds depend on camera distance.\n\nPerformance impact: None

trans-unit.id: Joining a world with citizens who play similar lengths of time will prevent some citizens from far-suprassing others in progression.

trans-unit.target: Si te unes a un mundo con ciudadanos que juegan periodos de tiempo similares al tuyo, evitarás que su progresión supere la tuya significativamente.

trans-unit.id: When checked, exhaustion limit will have no effect on server matching in the server browser.
trans-unit.source: When checked, exhaustion limit will have no effect on server matching in the server browser.
trans-unit.target: Al activarlo, el límite de cansancio no afectará al emparejamiento de servidores en el navegador de servidores.

trans-unit.id: Max active players, 0 = Unrestricted. Setting this gives your match score a boost in the server browser when you have fewer players than needed, and an extra boost if players have recently abandoned.(This affects your server score only and is not limiting amount of total users that can connect)
trans-unit.source: Max active players, 0 = Unrestricted. Setting this gives your match score a boost in the server browser when you have fewer players than needed, and an extra boost if players have recently abandoned.(This affects your server score only and is not limiting amount of total users that can connect)
trans-unit.target: Máximo de jugadores activos, 0 = Sin restricciones. Al establecer esto, la puntuación de tu partido se incrementa en el navegador del servidor cuando tienes menos jugadores de los necesarios, y un impulso adicional si los jugadores han abandonado recientemente (esto afecta sólo a la puntuación del servidor y no limita la cantidad de usuarios totales que pueden conectarse)
El árbol ya está tirado en el suelo.

trans-unit.id: When multiple civic articles can apply to a given action, the one with the highest priority value will be used. (the higher the number, the higher the priority)
trans-unit.source: When multiple civic articles can apply to a given action, the one with the highest priority value will be used. (the higher the number, the higher the priority)
trans-unit.target: Cuando varios artículos cívicos pueden aplicarse a una acción dada, se usará aquel con el mayor valor de prioridad (a mayor valor, mayor prioridad).

trans-unit.id: Citizens in this group can remove occupants of this elected title immediately at any government office.
trans-unit.source: Citizens in this group can remove occupants of this elected title immediately at any government office.
trans-unit.target: Los ciudadanos de este grupo podrán eliminar a los ocupantes de este título de elecciones inmediatamente en cualquier oficina gubernamental.
Pizza de Mar Agradable a los Sentidos
Rollo de Fideos e Intestino Delgado

trans-unit.id: Uses wind to produce electrical power. Requires clear space for 10 blocks in front of the blades for full power generation. Gains a small output boost when placed at higher elevations.
trans-unit.source: Uses wind to produce electrical power. Requires clear space for 10 blocks in front of the blades for full power generation. Gains a small output boost when placed at higher elevations.
trans-unit.target: Aprovecha el viento para generar energía eléctrica. Necesita un espacio de 10 bloques delante de las palas para generar el máximo de energía. Genera una pequeña cantidad adicional al colocarse en zonas elevadas.

trans-unit.id: Uses wind to produce mechanical power. Requires clear space for 10 blocks in front of the blades for full power generation. Gains a small output boost when placed at higher elevations.
trans-unit.source: Uses wind to produce mechanical power. Requires clear space for 10 blocks in front of the blades for full power generation. Gains a small output boost when placed at higher elevations.
trans-unit.target: Aprovecha el viento para generar energía mecánica. Necesita un espacio de 10 bloques delante de las palas para generar el máximo de energía. Genera una pequeña cantidad adicional al colocarse en zonas elevadas.

trans-unit.id: Uses the power of flowing water to produce mechanical power. Must be placed in fresh water and produces double power when placed in both a river and waterfall.
trans-unit.source: Uses the power of flowing water to produce mechanical power. Must be placed in fresh water and produces double power when placed in both a river and waterfall.
trans-unit.target: Utiliza la fuerza del agua que fluye para producir energía mecánica. Debe colocarse en agua dulce y produce doble energía cuando se coloca tanto en un río como en una cascada.
Como un sofá cualquiera, pero tapizado.
Como una silla cualquiera, pero tapizada.

trans-unit.id: A wooden hanging rack designed for towels.
trans-unit.source: A wooden hanging rack designed for towels.
trans-unit.target: Un perchero de madera diseñado para las toallas.

trans-unit.id: Generates electrical power from the sun! Requires a clear view of the sky above the generator for full output. Internal batteries ensure generation during nighttime.

trans-unit.target: Genera energía eléctrica a partir del sol. Requiere una visión clara del cielo por encima del generador para obtener la máxima potencia. Las baterías internas aseguran la generación durante la noche.

trans-unit.id: Sweet but a suprising source of vitamins.

trans-unit.id: Noodles made from delicious milled white grains.

trans-unit.id: When you feel nostalgic and miss that cozy hometown feeling.

trans-unit.target: Una simple camisa blanca con corbata y un chaleco de color.

trans-unit.id: Reinforced pants for exploring but still be fashionable.
trans-unit.source: Reinforced pants for exploring but still be fashionable.

trans-unit.id: A classic adventuring hat protecting you from the unknown.
trans-unit.source: A classic adventuring hat protecting you from the unknown.
trans-unit.target: Un clásico sombrero de aventurero que te protege de lo desconocido.

trans-unit.id: Sturdy gloves comfortably lined with cotton for extra insulation against the elements.
trans-unit.source: Sturdy gloves comfortably lined with cotton for extra insulation against the elements.
trans-unit.target: Guantes robustos recubiertos con algodón para un mejor aislamiento frente a factores externos.

trans-unit.id: Boots with rubber soles and thermal insulation for comfort yet still be durabable.
trans-unit.source: Boots with rubber soles and thermal insulation for comfort yet still be durabable.
trans-unit.target: Botas con suelas de goma y fabricadas con aislamiento térmico, aumentando su comodidad y manteniendo su durabilidad.

trans-unit.id: A smooth leather belt with a simple buckle design to not get caught in branches while exploring.
trans-unit.source: A smooth leather belt with a simple buckle design to not get caught in branches while exploring.
trans-unit.target: Un cinturón de cuero liso con un sencillo diseño de hebilla para que no se enganche en las ramas mientras explora.

trans-unit.id: Simple low indoors working shoes helps avoiding slipping on wet surfaces in a large kitchen.
trans-unit.source: Simple low indoors working shoes helps avoiding slipping on wet surfaces in a large kitchen.
trans-unit.target: Calzado plano sencillo para trabajar en casa que ayuda a evitar resbalones en superficies húmedas en una cocina grande.

trans-unit.id: A clean Chef's shirt to spot all the spots.
trans-unit.source: A clean Chef's shirt to spot all the spots.
trans-unit.target: Camisa limpia como la de un cocinero al que no se le escapa ni una mancha.

trans-unit.id: Checkered style pants for hiding the truths of working in a kitchen.
trans-unit.source: Checkered style pants for hiding the truths of working in a kitchen.
trans-unit.target: Elegantes pantalones a cuadros para ocultar las verdades del trabajo en la cocina.

trans-unit.id: To keep your hair in one place while stirring the pots.

trans-unit.id: Forces resolution of property crises by removing claims now. Pass individual settlement, or leave blank for 'all settlements in crisis'.
trans-unit.source: Forces resolution of property crises by removing claims now. Pass individual settlement, or leave blank for 'all settlements in crisis'.
trans-unit.target: Fuerza la resolución de una crisis de propiedades eliminando todas las reclamaciones. Se puede especificar un asentamiento concreto, o dejarlo en blanco para considerar todos los asentamientos en crisis.

trans-unit.id: API authentication key which may be used to access Web UI without a game user. May be used for external communication or by automation tools. Keep this setting a secret has it can be used to perform dangerous actions!
trans-unit.source: API authentication key which may be used to access Web UI without a game user. May be used for external communication or by automation tools. Keep this setting a secret has it can be used to perform dangerous actions!

Puede ser utilizado para la comunicación externa o por las herramientas de automatización. Mantén esta configuración en secreto ya que puede ser utilizada para realizar acciones peligrosas!

trans-unit.source: Elected Titles are government officials that can be assigned permissions to manage government policy.
trans-unit.target: Los títulos electos son miembros oficiales del gobierno que cuentan con ciertos permisos para administrar las políticas gubernamentales.

trans-unit.id: Titles can be either appointed or elected titles, and are used to describe a citizen's job, social status, or responsibilities.
trans-unit.source: Titles can be either appointed or elected titles, and are used to describe a citizen's job, social status, or responsibilities.
trans-unit.target: Los títulos pueden ser designados o elegidos, y se utilizan para describir el trabajo, el estatus social o las responsabilidades de un ciudadano.

trans-unit.id: The left part of the comparison.
trans-unit.source: The left part of the comparison.
trans-unit.target: La parte izquierda de la comparativa.

trans-unit.id: The right part of the comparison.
trans-unit.source: The right part of the comparison.
trans-unit.target: La parte derecha de la comparativa.
La persona que está siendo revisada.

trans-unit.id: Laws determine rules and processes that all citizens are compelled to follow.
trans-unit.source: Laws determine rules and processes that all citizens are compelled to follow.
trans-unit.target: Las leyes determinan normas y procesos que todos los ciudadanos están obligados a seguir.

trans-unit.id: A poll set to a group of citizens to determine a position or referendum.
trans-unit.source: A poll set to a group of citizens to determine a position or referendum.
trans-unit.target: Encuesta creada para que un grupo de ciudadanos pueda convocar un cargo o referéndum.
El momento en que se iniciaron las elecciones.

trans-unit.id: The time the election ends or ended.
trans-unit.source: The time the election ends or ended.
trans-unit.target: El momento en que la elección termina o terminó.

trans-unit.id: The election process used for voting.
trans-unit.source: The election process used for voting.
trans-unit.target: El proceso electoral utilizado para votar.

trans-unit.id: The title that is voted upon.
trans-unit.source: The title that is voted upon.
trans-unit.target: El título sobre el cual se está votando.

trans-unit.id: Actions that will occur once the election is completed.
trans-unit.source: Actions that will occur once the election is completed.
trans-unit.target: Acciones que tendrán lugar cuando terminen las elecciones.

trans-unit.id: Vote for a candidate in an election.
trans-unit.source: Vote for a candidate in an election.
trans-unit.target: Vota a un candidato en las elecciones.

trans-unit.id: Ends an election immediately, blocking its result.
trans-unit.source: Ends an election immediately, blocking its result.
trans-unit.target: Termina una elección inmediatamente, bloqueando su resultado.

trans-unit.id: A map that defines the areas of the world covered by a specific set of districts.
trans-unit.source: A map that defines the areas of the world covered by a specific set of districts.
trans-unit.target: Un mapa que define las áreas del mundo cubiertas por un conjunto específico de distritos.

trans-unit.id: Sleep in the bed to advance time.
trans-unit.source: Sleep in the bed to advance time.
trans-unit.target: Duerme en la cama para adelantar el tiempo.

trans-unit.id: When your goal is to really light up the heaven!
trans-unit.source: When your goal is to really light up the heaven!
trans-unit.target: ¡Cuando tu objetivo es iluminar de verdad el cielo!

trans-unit.id: A simple hewn wooden nightstand you can pile unread books on.
trans-unit.source: A simple hewn wooden nightstand you can pile unread books on.
trans-unit.target: Una simple mesita de noche de madera tallada en la que puedes apilar los libros no leídos.

trans-unit.id: A contraption to catch unsuspecting crabs in search of prey.
trans-unit.source: A contraption to catch unsuspecting crabs in search of prey.
trans-unit.target: Un artilugio para atrapar cangrejos desprevenidos en busca de presas.

trans-unit.id: A decorative table made from cast iron.
trans-unit.source: A decorative table made from cast iron.
trans-unit.target: Una mesa decorativa de hierro fundido.

trans-unit.id: A luxurious bed made from the finest cotton strands with added gold filling for the royal experience.
trans-unit.source: A luxurious bed made from the finest cotton strands with added gold filling for the royal experience.
trans-unit.target: Una lujosa cama fabricada con los más finos hilos de algodón y con relleno de oro para una experiencia real.

trans-unit.id: A solid bed made slightly more comfortable by adding cotton.
trans-unit.source: A solid bed made slightly more comfortable by adding cotton.
trans-unit.target: Una cama sólida que se hace un poco más cómoda añadiendo algodón.

trans-unit.id: A material used to make biodiesel. Not suitable for food.
trans-unit.source: A material used to make biodiesel. Not suitable for food.
trans-unit.target: Material utilizado para fabricar biodiésel. No es apto para la alimentación.

trans-unit.id: A revolutionary method to acquire butter.
trans-unit.source: A revolutionary method to acquire butter.
trans-unit.target: Un método revolucionario para adquirir mantequilla.

trans-unit.id: A multipurpose filler that is made from what you have available
trans-unit.source: A multipurpose filler that is made from what you have available
trans-unit.target: Un relleno multiuso que se hace con lo que tienes disponible
Borde de la Rejilla de la Ventana

trans-unit.id: Increases the headshot damage by 50 percent.
trans-unit.source: Increases the headshot damage by 50 percent.
trans-unit.target: Aumenta el daño de los disparos a la cabeza en un 50%.

trans-unit.id: Allows you to recover arrows shot into animals when harvesting them with a 50 percent chance.
trans-unit.source: Allows you to recover arrows shot into animals when harvesting them with a 50 percent chance.
trans-unit.target: Permite recuperar las flechas disparadas a los animales al recolectarlos con una probabilidad del 50%.
No se puede cavar mientras se lleva {0}.

trans-unit.id: Wooden crab pots must be placed underwater in salt water to function.
trans-unit.source: Wooden crab pots must be placed underwater in salt water to function.
trans-unit.target: Las nasas de madera para cangrejos deben colocarse sumergidas en agua salada para que funcionen.
La autentificación de desarrollador se ha realizado con éxito.
La cuenta no es de nivel de desarrollador.

trans-unit.id: A profiling session is being started for the server. Gameplay experience could be degraded for the time being.
trans-unit.source: A profiling session is being started for the server. Gameplay experience could be degraded for the time being.
trans-unit.target: Se está iniciando una sesión de perfilado para el servidor. La experiencia de juego podría degradarse por el momento.
Obtener volcado de memoria + perfil de la CPU

trans-unit.id: Would you like to open the results directory?

trans-unit.target: No se ha podido iniciar el perfilado

trans-unit.id: Make sure you have `dotnet-dump` and `dotnet-trace` installed and available in your PATH.

Consulta los registros para conocer los detalles de la instalación.

trans-unit.source: Channel name must start with a letter; may only contain letters, numbers and dashes/underscores; and must end with a letter or number.

trans-unit.id: These properties can be filtered in the Trigger section of a law, to determine when the trigger should be fired.
trans-unit.source: These properties can be filtered in the Trigger section of a law, to determine when the trigger should be fired.
trans-unit.target: Estas propiedades pueden ser filtradas en la sección de desencadenantes de una ley, para determinar cuándo debe dispararse.

trans-unit.id: These parameters will be available inside the 'If' and 'Then' sections of a law, and are filled in with whatever causes the trigger.
trans-unit.source: These parameters will be available inside the 'If' and 'Then' sections of a law, and are filled in with whatever causes the trigger.
trans-unit.target: Estos parámetros estarán disponibles dentro de las secciones "Si" y "Entonces" de una ley, y se rellenan con lo que provoca el desencadenante.

trans-unit.id: Advanced properties can be viewed by clicking the settings icon.
trans-unit.source: Advanced properties can be viewed by clicking the settings icon.
trans-unit.target: Las propiedades avanzadas se pueden ver haciendo clic en el icono de configuración.

trans-unit.id: Election ended in a tie, no action taken.
trans-unit.source: Election ended in a tie, no action taken.
trans-unit.target: La elección terminó en empate, no se tomó ninguna medida.

trans-unit.id: Election ended in a tie, winners were chosen randomly.
trans-unit.source: Election ended in a tie, winners were chosen randomly.
trans-unit.target: La elección terminó en empate, los ganadores fueron elegidos al azar.

trans-unit.id: Election ended in a tie, incumbent and highest reputation candidates were prioritized.
trans-unit.source: Election ended in a tie, incumbent and highest reputation candidates were prioritized.
trans-unit.target: La elección terminó en empate, se priorizaron los candidatos titulares y de mayor reputación.

trans-unit.id: Election ended in a tie, non-incumbent and highest reputation candidates were prioritized.
trans-unit.source: Election ended in a tie, non-incumbent and highest reputation candidates were prioritized.
trans-unit.target: La elección terminó en empate, se priorizaron los candidatos no titulares y de mayor reputación.

trans-unit.id: You have already voted in this election.
trans-unit.source: You have already voted in this election.

trans-unit.source: You may vote in this election.

trans-unit.source: {0} has removed you from being a {1}.

{0} ha quitado a {1} de ser un {2}.

trans-unit.id: Anyone can become a {0} instantly without approval.
trans-unit.source: Anyone can become a {0} instantly without approval.
trans-unit.target: Cualquiera puede convertirse en un {0} al instante sin necesidad de aprobación.

trans-unit.source: {0} has applied to be a {1}. You may approve or reject this application on {2}.
