trans-unit.id: You were accepted by {0} and are now a {1}!
trans-unit.source: You were accepted by {0} and are now a {1}!
trans-unit.target: ¡Has sido aceptado por {0} y ahora eres un {1}!

trans-unit.id: You have invited {0} to become a {1}.
trans-unit.source: You have invited {0} to become a {1}.
trans-unit.target: Has invitado a {0} a convertirse en {1}.

trans-unit.id: You are now no longer a {0}.
trans-unit.source: You are now no longer a {0}.

trans-unit.target: Invite a la gente a convertirse en un {0}

trans-unit.id: Remember: rooms can have small gaps (one or two spaces wide) for doors and windows.
trans-unit.source: Remember: rooms can have small gaps (one or two spaces wide) for doors and windows.
trans-unit.target: Recuerda: las habitaciones pueden tener pequeños huecos (uno o dos espacios de ancho) para puertas y ventanas.

trans-unit.id: Expand your property so you have room to grow.
trans-unit.source: Expand your property so you have room to grow.
trans-unit.target: Amplía tu propiedad para tener espacio para crecer.

trans-unit.id: Target a rock and hold left mouse button.
trans-unit.source: Target a rock and hold left mouse button.
trans-unit.target: Apunta a una roca y mantén el botón izquierdo del ratón.

trans-unit.id: Welcome to Eco, citizen.\n\nAround you is a living ecosystem, rich with plants, animals, and natural resources. Take a look around.
trans-unit.source: Welcome to Eco, citizen.\n\nAround you is a living ecosystem, rich with plants, animals, and natural resources. Take a look around.
trans-unit.target: Bienvenido a Eco, ciudadano.\n\nA tu alrededor hay un ecosistema vivo, rico en plantas, animales y recursos naturales. Echa un vistazo.

trans-unit.id: Brace yourself, and look up. There's something orbiting the planet that you need to see.
trans-unit.source: Brace yourself, and look up. There's something orbiting the planet that you need to see.
trans-unit.target: Prepárate y mira hacia arriba. Hay algo que orbita el planeta y que tienes que ver.

trans-unit.id: Look for the meteor in the sky.
trans-unit.source: Look for the meteor in the sky.
trans-unit.target: Busca el meteorito en el cielo.

trans-unit.id: The map will let you see the world around you and the forces that affect it.
trans-unit.source: The map will let you see the world around you and the forces that affect it.
trans-unit.target: El mapa te permitirá ver el mundo que te rodea y las fuerzas que lo afectan.

trans-unit.id: Under 'Markers', click on 'Drop Marker' to mark a position.
trans-unit.source: Under 'Markers', click on 'Drop Marker' to mark a position.
trans-unit.target: En "Marcadores", haga clic en "Crear marcador" para marcar una posición.

trans-unit.id: Place your tent in a good location: either near established communities where you can trade, or out in the wilderness near natural resources.
trans-unit.source: Place your tent in a good location: either near established communities where you can trade, or out in the wilderness near natural resources.
trans-unit.target: Coloca tu tienda en una buena ubicación: bien cerca de comunidades establecidas donde puedas comerciar, o bien en la naturaleza, cerca de los recursos naturales.

trans-unit.id: Place your tent in a location close to natural resources such as food, stone, and trees.
trans-unit.source: Place your tent in a location close to natural resources such as food, stone, and trees.
trans-unit.target: Coloca tu tienda de campaña en un lugar cercano a recursos naturales como alimentos, piedras y árboles.

trans-unit.id: You've got some tools in your tent you can use to collect more resources. Grab those now.
trans-unit.source: You've got some tools in your tent you can use to collect more resources. Grab those now.
trans-unit.target: Tienes algunas herramientas en tu tienda que puedes utilizar para recoger más recursos. Tómalas ahora.
Haga clic en la pestaña de almacenamiento.

trans-unit.id: Next to your tent there is a small stockpile, let's fill it with wood to use in crafting.
trans-unit.source: Next to your tent there is a small stockpile, let's fill it with wood to use in crafting.
trans-unit.target: Junto a tu tienda hay una pequeña pila de almacenamiento, llenémosla de madera para usarla en fabricaciones.

trans-unit.id: Chop the fallen log into pieces.
trans-unit.source: Chop the fallen log into pieces.
trans-unit.target: Tala el tronco caído en trozos.

trans-unit.id: Place 10 logs in the stockpile by your tent.
trans-unit.source: Place 10 logs in the stockpile by your tent.
trans-unit.target: Coloca 10 troncos en la pila junto a tu tienda.

trans-unit.id: Find the Workbench Recipe and click 'Order'.
trans-unit.source: Find the Workbench Recipe and click 'Order'.
trans-unit.target: Busque la Receta de la Mesa de Trabajo y haga clic en "Pedir".
Preparar los troncos para la construcción

trans-unit.id: Click 'Work' to spend calories on the crafting project.
trans-unit.source: Click 'Work' to spend calories on the crafting project.
trans-unit.target: Haz clic en "Trabajar" para gastar calorías en el proyecto de artesanía.

trans-unit.id: When complete, pick up the hewn logs from the storage tab.
trans-unit.source: When complete, pick up the hewn logs from the storage tab.
trans-unit.target: Cuando hayas terminado, recoge los troncos tallados de la pestaña de almacenamiento.

trans-unit.id: You can set who is able to use your property for both objects and deeds.
trans-unit.source: You can set who is able to use your property for both objects and deeds.
trans-unit.target: Puede establecer quién puede utilizar su propiedad tanto para los objetos como para las escrituras.

trans-unit.id: Open the Deed by clicking the property name. Add friends to the authorized list if you like.
trans-unit.source: Open the Deed by clicking the property name. Add friends to the authorized list if you like.
trans-unit.target: Abra la escritura haciendo clic en el nombre de la propiedad. Añade amigos a la lista de autorizados si lo deseas.

trans-unit.id: You can use a machete to move faster through thick vegetation.
trans-unit.source: You can use a machete to move faster through thick vegetation.
trans-unit.target: Puedes usar un machete para moverte más rápido entre la espesa vegetación.

trans-unit.id: Complete your shelter to begin earning experience from it.\n
trans-unit.source: Complete your shelter to begin earning experience from it.\n
trans-unit.target: Completa tu refugio para empezar a ganar experiencia con él.\n

trans-unit.id: Craft more hewn logs, and fully enclose a room with walls and a ceiling.
trans-unit.source: Craft more hewn logs, and fully enclose a room with walls and a ceiling.
trans-unit.target: Haz más troncos tallados y encierra una habitación con paredes y techo.

trans-unit.id: Use a shovel to move dirt.
trans-unit.source: Use a shovel to move dirt.
trans-unit.target: Utiliza una pala para mover la tierra.

trans-unit.id: Target the ground and hold left mouse button.
trans-unit.source: Target the ground and hold left mouse button.
trans-unit.target: Apunta al suelo y mantén el botón izquierdo del ratón.

trans-unit.id: To mine, first break rocks into smaller pieces, then pick up the pieces.
trans-unit.source: To mine, first break rocks into smaller pieces, then pick up the pieces.
trans-unit.target: Para minar, primero hay que romper las rocas en trozos más pequeños y luego recoger los trozos.

trans-unit.id: Choose a profession and specialty, and later you may trade the fruits of your labor with your fellow citizens.\n
trans-unit.source: Choose a profession and specialty, and later you may trade the fruits of your labor with your fellow citizens.\n
trans-unit.target: Elige una profesión y una especialidad, y más tarde podrás comerciar con los frutos de tu trabajo con tus conciudadanos.\n

trans-unit.id: Specializations are grouped into professions. Inspect a profession by mousing over its specialties.
trans-unit.source: Specializations are grouped into professions. Inspect a profession by mousing over its specialties.
trans-unit.target: Las especialidades se agrupan en profesiones. Inspeccione una profesión pasando el ratón por encima de sus especialidades.

trans-unit.id: You've reached the end of the tutorial, but there's much more depth to explore.
trans-unit.source: You've reached the end of the tutorial, but there's much more depth to explore.
trans-unit.target: Has llegado al final del tutorial, pero hay mucha más profundidad que explorar.

trans-unit.id: The Ecopedia is your go-to source of information. There, you can look up and browse how all the systems work: like climate, nutrition, civics, residency, power, pollution, and much more.
trans-unit.source: The Ecopedia is your go-to source of information. There, you can look up and browse how all the systems work: like climate, nutrition, civics, residency, power, pollution, and much more.
trans-unit.target: La Ecopedia es tu fuente de información. En ella puedes buscar y navegar por el funcionamiento de todos los sistemas, tales como el clima, la nutrición, los derechos civiles, la residencia, la energía, la contaminación y mucho más.

trans-unit.id: You're low on calories, find wild food in the area..
trans-unit.source: You're low on calories, find wild food in the area..
trans-unit.target: Tienes pocas calorías, busca comida silvestre en la zona..

trans-unit.id: Find more wild food in the area.
trans-unit.source: Find more wild food in the area.
trans-unit.target: Encuentra más alimentos silvestres en la zona.

trans-unit.id: Eating a balanced diet will let you gain XP faster.
trans-unit.source: Eating a balanced diet will let you gain XP faster.
trans-unit.target: Llevar una dieta equilibrada te permitirá ganar XP más rápido.

trans-unit.id: Use the bed in your tent.
trans-unit.source: Use the bed in your tent.
trans-unit.target: Utiliza la cama de tu tienda.

trans-unit.id: To pass time faster, you can sleep in a bed.
trans-unit.source: To pass time faster, you can sleep in a bed.
trans-unit.target: Para pasar el tiempo más rápido, puedes dormir en una cama.

trans-unit.id: A profession is not a specialization.
trans-unit.source: A profession is not a specialization.
trans-unit.target: Una profesión no es una especialización.

trans-unit.source: This will remove the specialty {0}, which will reset all talents gained and refund you with {1} of XP ({2}). This will also permanently drop the level of {3} to 0. Continue?

trans-unit.id: As new citizens join this settlement, more claim papers and claim stakes will be spawned, allowing more land to be claimed. \n\nUse the land claim stakes to claim additional plots. Add the claim papers to claim stakes in the town to increase the number of plots that can be claimed.
trans-unit.source: As new citizens join this settlement, more claim papers and claim stakes will be spawned, allowing more land to be claimed. \n\nUse the land claim stakes to claim additional plots. Add the claim papers to claim stakes in the town to increase the number of plots that can be claimed.
trans-unit.target: A medida que nuevos ciudadanos se unan a este asentamiento, se generarán más documentos de reclamación y estacas de reclamación, lo que permitirá reclamar más tierras. \n\nUtiliza las estacas de reclamación de tierras para reclamar parcelas adicionales. Añade los documentos de reclamación a las estacas de reclamación de la ciudad para aumentar el número de parcelas que se pueden reclamar.
Dimensión de la Fuente de Letra

trans-unit.id:
Click to set rent on the property.

Rent is locked in when a citizen becomes a resident, and rent changes will not be applied unless they leave residency and return.

Owners are not subjected to rent or move-in fee.
trans-unit.source:
Click to set rent on the property.

Rent is locked in when a citizen becomes a resident, and rent changes will not be applied unless they leave residency and return.

Owners are not subjected to rent or move-in fee.
trans-unit.target:
Haz clic para definir el alquiler de la propiedad.

El alquiler se fija cuando un ciudadano se convierte en residente, y no se podrán realizar cambios a menos que abandonen la residencia y regresen.

Los dueños no tienen que pagar alquileres o tasas por mudanza.

trans-unit.id: An unexpected network disruption occured while handling an RCON connection.
trans-unit.source: An unexpected network disruption occured while handling an RCON connection.
trans-unit.target: Se ha producido una interrupción inesperada de la red mientras se gestionaba una conexión RCON.

trans-unit.id: The amount of objects shown on the minimap and its actual quality.\n\nPerformance impact: Average
trans-unit.source: The amount of objects shown on the minimap and its actual quality.\n\nPerformance impact: Average
trans-unit.target: La cantidad de objetos que se muestran en el minimapa y su calidad real.\n\n Impacto en el rendimiento: Medio

trans-unit.id: Enables / disables voice chat, this includes speaking and listening to other players.
trans-unit.source: Enables / disables voice chat, this includes speaking and listening to other players.
trans-unit.target: Activa / desactiva el chat de voz, esto incluye hablar y escuchar a otros jugadores.

trans-unit.id: Used to simulate outdoor light rays in the environment.\n\nPerformance Impact: Average
trans-unit.source: Used to simulate outdoor light rays in the environment.\n\nPerformance Impact: Average
trans-unit.target: Se utiliza para simular los rayos de luz exterior en el entorno.\n\nImpacto del rendimiento: Medio

trans-unit.id: \nThe list of players who have access to the deed.\nThese players will have full authority for objects on the deed.
trans-unit.source: \nThe list of players who have access to the deed.\nThese players will have full authority for objects on the deed.
trans-unit.target: \nLa lista de jugadores que tienen acceso a la escritura.\n-Estos jugadores tendrán plena autoridad sobre los objetos de la escritura.
Expandir / colapsar todos los grupos comerciales.
5 horas de enseñanza en cola (1,5 clases)

trans-unit.id: Shows commands to profile the server and generate diagnostic data.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands to profile the server and generate diagnostic data.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para caracterizar el servidor y generar datos de diagnóstico.

trans-unit.id: Should the Camera mode be enabled? (Note: this system is not finished yet and is currently disabled)
trans-unit.source: Should the Camera mode be enabled? (Note: this system is not finished yet and is currently disabled)
trans-unit.target: ¿Deben activarse el Modo Cámara? (Nota: este sistema aún no está terminado y actualmente está desactivado)
Muestra una lista con diferentes comandos de teletransporte

trans-unit.id: Reset animal sim population to initial values (as it was on world generation)
trans-unit.source: Reset animal sim population to initial values (as it was on world generation)
trans-unit.target: Restablecer la población de animales de la simulación a los valores iniciales (como era en la generación del mundo)

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for building and tech tree manipulation
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for building and tech tree manipulation
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para manipulación de construcciones y del árbol tecnológico
Muestra comandos relacionados con el chat.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands allowing to list, add, remove, and clear many things in the game (including laws, titles, elections, bank accounts, and many more). Ex: /objects remove laws, Law 1
trans-unit.source: Shows commands allowing to list, add, remove, and clear many things in the game (including laws, titles, elections, bank accounts, and many more). Ex: /objects remove laws, Law 1
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos que permiten a los administradores incluir, añadir, eliminar y borrar elementos del juego (incluyendo leyes, títulos, elecciones, cuentas bancarias y mucho más). Por ejemplo: /objets remove laws, Law 1

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for performing an animated emote.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for performing an animated emote.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para realizar un gesto animado.
Muestra comandos para control de asentamientos.
Muestra comandos para manipulación de cuartos.
Muestra comandos para manipulación de propiedades.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for changing things about users.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for changing things about users.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para modificación de parámetros de usuarios.
Muestra comandos para administración de usuarios.
Muestra comandos para manipulación de dinero.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands related to the economy.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands related to the economy.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos relacionados con la economía.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for manipulations with meteor.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for manipulations with meteor.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para manipulación del meteorito.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands related to user-defined districts.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands related to user-defined districts.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos relacionados con distritos definidos por el usuario.

trans-unit.id: Once an election of this type completes, another of the same type cannot be started for this many days.
trans-unit.source: Once an election of this type completes, another of the same type cannot be started for this many days.
trans-unit.target: Una vez que finaliza una votación de este tipo, no se puede iniciar otra del mismo tipo durante estos días.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for viewing and manipulating player titles.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for viewing and manipulating player titles.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para ver y manipular títulos de jugadores.
Muestra comandos para manipulación de avatares.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for world pollution manipulation.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for world pollution manipulation.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para manipulación de la contaminación mundial.
Muestra los comandos específicos del usuario

trans-unit.id: A stockpile for distributing items to new players. Allows you to choose a specific set of items which each new player will be able to take.
trans-unit.source: A stockpile for distributing items to new players. Allows you to choose a specific set of items which each new player will be able to take.
trans-unit.target: Una pila de almacenamiento para distribuir artículos a los nuevos jugadores. Le permite elegir un conjunto específico de objetos que cada nuevo jugador podrá llevar.

trans-unit.id: A porcelain bathtub for when you need to get clean or just relax.
trans-unit.source: A porcelain bathtub for when you need to get clean or just relax.
trans-unit.target: Bañera de porcelana, perfecta para bañarte o simplemente para relajarte.

trans-unit.id: The assembly line allows for mass production of mechanical products.
trans-unit.source: The assembly line allows for mass production of mechanical products.
trans-unit.target: Las cadenas de montaje permiten la producción en masa de productos mecánicos.

trans-unit.id: An ashlar stone bench. Great for display though maybe not as comfy as a padded couch.
trans-unit.source: An ashlar stone bench. Great for display though maybe not as comfy as a padded couch.
trans-unit.target: Un banco de piedra de sillería. Es ideal para exhibirlo, aunque quizá no sea tan cómodo como un sofá acolchado.

trans-unit.id: A fancy ashlar stone table that has been adorned with gold.
trans-unit.source: A fancy ashlar stone table that has been adorned with gold.
trans-unit.target: Una elegante mesa de sillar de piedra que ha sido adornada con oro.

trans-unit.id: All citizens are survivalists in the world of Eco. How can you save the world if you can't save yourself?
trans-unit.source: All citizens are survivalists in the world of Eco. How can you save the world if you can't save yourself?
trans-unit.target: Todos los ciudadanos son supervivientes en el mundo de Eco. ¿Acaso puedes salvar al mundo sin poder salvarte a ti mismo?

trans-unit.id: Metal is an important part of progress and smelting is the first step into a new age. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Metal is an important part of progress and smelting is the first step into a new age. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: El metal es una parte importante del progreso y la fundición es el primer paso hacia una nueva era. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Self-improvement increases both the amount of weight citizens can carry and their stomach capacity. It also decreases the calories expended when using hammers and shovels. Experience is gained when leveling up other specialties.
trans-unit.source: Self-improvement increases both the amount of weight citizens can carry and their stomach capacity. It also decreases the calories expended when using hammers and shovels. Experience is gained when leveling up other specialties.
trans-unit.target: La superación personal aumenta tanto la cantidad de peso que los ciudadanos pueden llevar como su capacidad estomacal. También disminuye las calorías gastadas al utilizar martillos y palas. Se gana experiencia al subir de nivel otras especialidades.

trans-unit.id: Pottery is an advancement in masonry and can provide an excellent building material for communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Pottery is an advancement in masonry and can provide an excellent building material for communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La cerámica es una mejora de mampostería que permite obtener materiales de gran calidad para tus comunidades. Mejora su nivel creando recetas asociadas.

trans-unit.id: Paper to carry the written word. Or used to stuff in bookshelves. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Paper to carry the written word. Or used to stuff in bookshelves. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Habilidad para la creación y uso del papel, con el que escribir textos o para otras cosas que se colocan en estanterías. Mejora su nivel creando recetas asociadas a esta habilidad.

trans-unit.id: While it takes some advanced tools and constructions, harvesting and refining oil can be an important step. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: While it takes some advanced tools and constructions, harvesting and refining oil can be an important step. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Aunque necesita algunas construcciones y herramientas avanzadas, esta habilidad para la extracción y el refinado de petróleo es un paso importante para tu sociedad. Mejora su nivel creando recetas asociadas a esta habilidad.

trans-unit.id: Hitting rocks with a pickaxe can be surprisingly difficult. Levels up by breaking rocks.
trans-unit.source: Hitting rocks with a pickaxe can be surprisingly difficult. Levels up by breaking rocks.
trans-unit.target: Golpear las rocas con un pico puede ser sorprendentemente difícil. Sube de nivel rompiendo rocas.

trans-unit.id: Milling various products can create important materials for baking and other uses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Milling various products can create important materials for baking and other uses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La molienda de varios productos puede crear materiales importantes para la repostería y otros usos. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Mechanics for more advanced creations. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Mechanics for more advanced creations. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Habilidad para el desarrollo de la mecánica, con la que poder mejorar tu fabricación. Mejora su nivel creando recetas asociadas a esta habilidad.

trans-unit.id: Rocks and mortar can provide a suitable building material alternative to wood. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Rocks and mortar can provide a suitable building material alternative to wood. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Las rocas y el mortero pueden proporcionar un material de construcción adecuado como alternativa a la madera. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Wood is a useful resource and cutting down trees is a skill anyone can appreciate. Levels up by felling trees and clearing debris.
trans-unit.source: Wood is a useful resource and cutting down trees is a skill anyone can appreciate. Levels up by felling trees and clearing debris.
trans-unit.target: La madera es un recurso útil y cortar árboles es una habilidad que cualquiera puede apreciar. Sube de nivel talando árboles y limpiando los escombros.

trans-unit.id: Advanced industrialization to produce larger machines and advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced industrialization to produce larger machines and advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Habilidad de industrialización avanzada que permite la fabricación de máquinas más grandes y de tecnología de última generación. Mejora su nivel creando recetas asociadas a esta habilidad.

trans-unit.id: Hunt animals for skin and meat. Levels up by successfully hunting.
trans-unit.source: Hunt animals for skin and meat. Levels up by successfully hunting.
trans-unit.target: Caza animales para obtener piel y carne. Sube de nivel cazando con éxito.

trans-unit.id: Glassworkers have improved ability to create glass which can be used as a clear building material or framed in steel to create a more industrial look. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Glassworkers have improved ability to create glass which can be used as a clear building material or framed in steel to create a more industrial look. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Los vidrieros han mejorado la capacidad de crear vidrio que puede utilizarse como material de construcción transparente o enmarcado en acero para crear un aspecto más industrial. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Gathering covers harvesting materials from both the natural environment and human-created farms. Levels up by gathering plants - farmed or natural.
trans-unit.source: Gathering covers harvesting materials from both the natural environment and human-created farms. Levels up by gathering plants - farmed or natural.
trans-unit.target: La recolección abarca la recogida de materiales tanto del entorno natural como de las granjas creadas por el hombre. Sube de nivel recolectando plantas, cultivadas o naturales.

trans-unit.id: Adding additional nutrients to the soil can improve farming yield or, if overdone, ruin it. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Adding additional nutrients to the soil can improve farming yield or, if overdone, ruin it. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Añadir nutrientes adicionales a la tierra puede mejorar el rendimiento de la agricultura o, si se exagera, arruinarlo. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: The art of planting and cultivating flora. Levels up by crafting related recipes and using the hoe.
trans-unit.source: The art of planting and cultivating flora. Levels up by crafting related recipes and using the hoe.
trans-unit.target: El arte de plantar y cultivar la flora. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas y utilizando la azada.

trans-unit.id: Electronics improves the recipes for many advanced materials needed for advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Electronics improves the recipes for many advanced materials needed for advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La electrónica mejora las recetas de muchos materiales avanzados necesarios para la tecnología avanzada. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Cutting edge cooking works with ingredients that don't quite sound like food but can potentially provide high calorie and nutrition. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Cutting edge cooking works with ingredients that don't quite sound like food but can potentially provide high calorie and nutrition. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La cocina de vanguardia trabaja con ingredientes que no parecen comida pero que pueden aportar muchas calorías y nutrientes. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: The basics of cooking in a more civilized environment give bonuses to a variety of food recipes. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: The basics of cooking in a more civilized environment give bonuses to a variety of food recipes. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Los fundamentos de la cocina en un entorno más civilizado dan bonificaciones a una variedad de recetas de comida. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Allows the construction of advanced wood products for furniture and houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Allows the construction of advanced wood products for furniture and houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Permite la construcción de productos de madera avanzados para muebles y casas. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Cutting logs into usable crafting and building materials is an important skill for budding communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Cutting logs into usable crafting and building materials is an important skill for budding communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Cortar troncos para convertirlos en materiales utilizables para la artesanía y la construcción es una habilidad importante para las comunidades en ciernes. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Advanced techniques for producing food over a campfire with a little less burned and a little more golden brown. Levels up by crafting campfire recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced techniques for producing food over a campfire with a little less burned and a little more golden brown. Levels up by crafting campfire recipes.
trans-unit.target: Técnicas avanzadas para elaborar comida en una hoguera con un poco menos de quemado y un poco más de dorado. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas de fogata relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Butchery allows for more usable products to be harvested from hunted animals and fish. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Butchery allows for more usable products to be harvested from hunted animals and fish. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La carnicería permite recolectar más productos utilizables a partir de animales y peces cazados. Sube de nivel creando recetas asociadas.

trans-unit.id: Basic Engineering allows easier construction of roads and gives access to early forms of mechanical power. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Basic Engineering allows easier construction of roads and gives access to early forms of mechanical power. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La ingeniería básica te da acceso a la construcción de carreteras y al uso de formas básicas de aprovecharte de la energía mecánica. Sube su nivel fabricando recetas relacionadas con esta habilidad.

trans-unit.id: An introduction to cooking with an oven. Levels up by crafting related unleavened recipes.
trans-unit.source: An introduction to cooking with an oven. Levels up by crafting related unleavened recipes.
trans-unit.target: Una introducción a la cocina con horno. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas sin levadura relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Advanced smelting aids in the production of steel - a key ingredient in the progress of any group. Levels up by crafting advanced smelting recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced smelting aids in the production of steel - a key ingredient in the progress of any group. Levels up by crafting advanced smelting recipes.
trans-unit.target: La fundición avanzada ayuda a la producción de acero, un ingrediente clave para el progreso de cualquier grupo. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas de fundición avanzadas.

trans-unit.id: Advanced masonry allows the production of high-quality stone furniture and material for houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced masonry allows the production of high-quality stone furniture and material for houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: La Mampostería avanzada permite fabricar muebles de piedra de alta calidad y material para las casas. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas relacionadas.

trans-unit.id: Advanced cooking techniques for producing more complex foods. Levels up by crafting advanced cooking recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced cooking techniques for producing more complex foods. Levels up by crafting advanced cooking recipes.
trans-unit.target: Técnicas avanzadas de cocción para producir alimentos más complejos. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas de cocina avanzadas.

trans-unit.id: Advanced baking mostly improves recipes that involve a leavening agent. Levels up by crafting advanced baking recipes.
trans-unit.source: Advanced baking mostly improves recipes that involve a leavening agent. Levels up by crafting advanced baking recipes.
trans-unit.target: La repostería avanzada mejora sobre todo las recetas que implican un agente leudante. Sube de nivel elaborando recetas de repostería avanzada.

trans-unit.id: Basic Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Tailoring recipes.
trans-unit.source: Basic Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Tailoring recipes.
trans-unit.target: Mejora Básica que aumenta en gran medida la eficiencia al elaborar recetas de sastrería.

trans-unit.id: Modern Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Tailoring recipes.
trans-unit.source: Modern Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Tailoring recipes.
trans-unit.target: Mejora Moderna que aumenta enormemente la eficiencia al elaborar recetas de sastrería.

trans-unit.id: Modern Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Mechanics recipes.
trans-unit.source: Modern Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Mechanics recipes.
trans-unit.target: Actualización Moderna que aumenta en gran medida la eficiencia al elaborar recetas de Mecánica.

trans-unit.id: An extremely useful synthetic material derived from petrochemicals.
trans-unit.source: An extremely useful synthetic material derived from petrochemicals.
trans-unit.target: Un material sintético extremadamente útil derivado de la petroquímica.

trans-unit.id: Provides speed and torque conversions from a rotating power source to another device.
trans-unit.source: Provides speed and torque conversions from a rotating power source to another device.
trans-unit.target: Proporciona conversiones de velocidad y par desde una fuente de energía rotativa a otro dispositivo.

trans-unit.id: An iron bolt used to hold together inventions.
trans-unit.source: An iron bolt used to hold together inventions.
trans-unit.target: Un perno de hierro que se utiliza para mantener unidos los inventos.

trans-unit.id: A crustacean that loves the ocean, just don't get caught in its pinch!
trans-unit.source: A crustacean that loves the ocean, just don't get caught in its pinch!
trans-unit.target: Un crustáceo al que le encanta el océano, ¡pero no te dejes atrapar por su pellizco!

trans-unit.id: A dressed salad that, with the added sweetness, it's pretty tasty.
trans-unit.source: A dressed salad that, with the added sweetness, it's pretty tasty.
trans-unit.target: Una ensalada aderezada que, con el dulzor añadido, es bastante sabrosa.
Planta de nombre científico Colocasia esculenta.

trans-unit.id: To give thanks for the fact that this food gives two extra nutrients than other food items of the same tier.
trans-unit.source: To give thanks for the fact that this food gives two extra nutrients than other food items of the same tier.
trans-unit.target: Dar gracias por el hecho de que este alimento aporte dos nutrientes más que otros alimentos del mismo nivel.

trans-unit.id: A thick stew chock-full of meat and charred vegetables. A surprisingly good combination.
trans-unit.source: A thick stew chock-full of meat and charred vegetables. A surprisingly good combination.
trans-unit.target: Un guiso espeso repleto de carne y verduras carbonizadas. Una combinación sorprendentemente buena.

trans-unit.id: Comforting, best served hot from the griddle.
trans-unit.source: Comforting, best served hot from the griddle.
trans-unit.target: Reconfortante. Se recomienda consumirlo caliente y directamente desde la parrilla.

trans-unit.id: A sweet pastry that is great for breakfast or anytime you need a quick boost of energy.
trans-unit.source: A sweet pastry that is great for breakfast or anytime you need a quick boost of energy.
trans-unit.target: Un pastelito dulce que es ideal para el desayuno o para cualquier momento en que necesite un rápido impulso de energía.
Camasia bien frita. Un poco grasosa.

trans-unit.id: Agave leaves that have been charred over a campfire.
trans-unit.source: Agave leaves that have been charred over a campfire.
trans-unit.target: Hojas de agave carbonizadas en una fogata.

trans-unit.id: A thick stew chock-full of meat, camas, and corn. A surprisingly good combination.
trans-unit.source: A thick stew chock-full of meat, camas, and corn. A surprisingly good combination.
trans-unit.target: Un gran estofado lleno de carne, camassia y maíz. Una combinación asombrosamente buena.

trans-unit.id: A multipurpose filler that is made from what you have available.
trans-unit.source: A multipurpose filler that is made from what you have available.
trans-unit.target: Un relleno multiuso que se hace con lo que tienes disponible.

trans-unit.id: An excellent fertilizer that provides a mix of nutrients, but especially potassium.
trans-unit.source: An excellent fertilizer that provides a mix of nutrients, but especially potassium.
trans-unit.target: Fertilizante de alta categoría, que proporciona una mezcla de nutrientes, mayoritariamente potasio.

trans-unit.id: A fossil fuel essential for manufacturing gasoline, plastics, and asphalt. Its extraction, transport, and burning all have environmental impacts.
trans-unit.source: A fossil fuel essential for manufacturing gasoline, plastics, and asphalt. Its extraction, transport, and burning all have environmental impacts.
trans-unit.target: Un combustible fósil esencial para la fabricación de gasolina, plásticos y asfalto. Su extracción, transporte y quemado tienen impactos ambientales.

trans-unit.id: A dusty surface formed by tampering dirt with a road tool. It's servicable for any wheeled vehicle.
trans-unit.source: A dusty surface formed by tampering dirt with a road tool. It's servicable for any wheeled vehicle.
trans-unit.target: Una superficie polvorienta formada por la manipulación de la tierra con una herramienta de carretera. Es útil para cualquier vehículo de ruedas.

trans-unit.id: To discover skill, construct a {0} at a {1}.
trans-unit.source: To discover skill, construct a {0} at a {1}.
trans-unit.target: Para descubrir esta habilidad, crea {0} en {1}.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for preforming debugging and hard testing commands.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for preforming debugging and hard testing commands.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos para depuración y pruebas de sistema.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for spawning a storage with predefined set of items in the game
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for spawning a storage with predefined set of items in the game
trans-unit.target: Muestra los comandos para generar un almacén con un grupo predefinido de objetos en el juego

trans-unit.id: Click to activate this channel in the Chat input.
trans-unit.source: Click to activate this channel in the Chat input.
trans-unit.target: Haga clic para activar este canal en la entrada del chat.
No se puede eliminar una pestaña fijada
No se puede eliminar una pestaña anclada

trans-unit.id: Shows commands related to work parties.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands related to work parties.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos relacionados con grupos de trabajo.

trans-unit.id: This position can be replaced by a new election now.
trans-unit.source: This position can be replaced by a new election now.
trans-unit.target: Este puesto puede ser sustituido por una nueva elección ahora.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands related to world stuff.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands related to world stuff.
trans-unit.target: Muestra comandos relacionados con el mundo.

trans-unit.id: Use a hammer to start building a house from the logs you've processed.
trans-unit.source: Use a hammer to start building a house from the logs you've processed.
trans-unit.target: Utiliza un martillo para empezar a construir una casa con los troncos que has procesado.

trans-unit.id: Here you can control access to your tent.\nYou can also configure access to your entire property as follows:
trans-unit.source: Here you can control access to your tent.\nYou can also configure access to your entire property as follows:
trans-unit.target: Aquí puedes controlar el acceso a tu tienda.\nTambién puedes configurar el acceso a toda tu propiedad de la siguiente manera:

trans-unit.id: The skill scroll can't be created, there is not enough space in the inventory.
trans-unit.source: The skill scroll can't be created, there is not enough space in the inventory.
trans-unit.target: El pergamino de habilidad no puede ser creado, no hay suficiente espacio en el inventario.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for a variety of housing operations.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for a variety of housing operations.
trans-unit.target: Muestra los comandos para una variedad de operaciones de vivienda.
Muestra comandos para procesos de fabricación.

trans-unit.id: Shows commands for common testing scenarios.
trans-unit.source: Shows commands for common testing scenarios.

trans-unit.id: Create all the government objects in their needed buildings near you, ratify the constitution, and add at least one of each civics object to their tables. Pass 'false' to make the constitution not require elections to make changes.

trans-unit.id: Sets the sales tax. Accepts decimals as a percent and with no rate provided the default is 10%
trans-unit.source: Sets the sales tax. Accepts decimals as a percent and with no rate provided the default is 10%

trans-unit.id: Multiplier applied to item max stack size. Values below 1 decrease max size, above 1 increase max size. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.source: Multiplier applied to item max stack size. Values below 1 decrease max size, above 1 increase max size. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.target: Multiplicador aplicado al tamaño máximo de pila de objetos. Los valores por debajo de 1 disminuirán el tamaño máximo, y por encima de 1 aumentarán el mismo. Se requiere un reinicio del servidor para un cálculo correcto de los valores finales.

trans-unit.id: Multiplier applied to item weight. Values below 1 decrease item weight, above 1 increase item weight. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.source: Multiplier applied to item weight. Values below 1 decrease item weight, above 1 increase item weight. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.target: Multiplicador aplicado al peso del objeto. Los valores por debajo de 1 disminuirán el peso del objeto, y por encima de 1 aumentarán el peso del mismo. Se requiere un reinicio del servidor para un cálculo correcto de los valores finales.

trans-unit.id: Multiplier applied to fuel yield per unit. Values below 1 decrease yield, above 1 increase yield. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.source: Multiplier applied to fuel yield per unit. Values below 1 decrease yield, above 1 increase yield. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.target: Multiplicador aplicado al rendimiento de combustible por unidad. Los valores por debajo de 1 disminuirán el rendimiento, y por encima de 1 aumentarán el mismo. Se requiere un reinicio del servidor para un cálculo correcto de los valores finales.

trans-unit.id: Multiplier applied to storage connection range. Values below 1 decrease range, above 1 increase range. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.source: Multiplier applied to storage connection range. Values below 1 decrease range, above 1 increase range. A server restart is required for correct calculation.
trans-unit.target: Multiplicador aplicado al alcance de conexión de almacenamientos. Los valores por debajo de 1 disminuirán el alcance, y por encima de 1 aumentarán el mismo. Se requiere un reinicio del servidor para un cálculo correcto de los valores finales.

trans-unit.id: Higher value priority means players will enter sooner.

trans-unit.id: Users assigned to a queue priority will advance to the front of the line of players with a lower number priority when trying to connect while the server is full. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.source: Users assigned to a queue priority will advance to the front of the line of players with a lower number priority when trying to connect while the server is full. Use either SLG ID or STEAMID64
trans-unit.target: Los usuarios con prioridad en cola avanzarán a las primeras posiciones en colas con jugadores con menor valor de prioridad al tratar de conectar en servidores completos. Escribe una ID de SLG o una STEAMID64

trans-unit.id: Should newly submitted textures wait for approval before displaying them? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players, and should stay enabled on public servers.
trans-unit.source: Should newly submitted textures wait for approval before displaying them? This is a layer of protection against displaying inappropriate images to the players, and should stay enabled on public servers.
trans-unit.target: ¿Deberían ser aprobadas las nuevas texturas enviadas antes de poder visualizarse? Esta opción es una capa de protección que permite controlar la visualización de imágenes inapropiadas para los jugadores, y debe permanecer activada en servidores públicos.

trans-unit.source: Should users be able to upload texture

trans-unit.source: Bank accounts serve as a storage and separation of currency for different uses by various citizens and government entities.
trans-unit.target: Las cuentas bancarias sirven para almacenar y separar las divisas para sus diferentes usos por parte de ciudadanos y entidades gubernamentales.

trans-unit.id: When this object is fully enabled, and the Constitution is valid, an election can be started to ratify the constitution and found the settlement.
trans-unit.source: When this object is fully enabled, and the Constitution is valid, an election can be started to ratify the constitution and found the settlement.
trans-unit.target: Si este objeto está completamente habilitado, y si existe una Constitución válida, podrán crearse unas elecciones para ratificar dicha Constitución y fundar el asentamiento.

trans-unit.id: Force-end the specified election, adding a vote if true is passed (default). If no election found, pass any, including draft ones.
trans-unit.source: Force-end the specified election, adding a vote if true is passed (default). If no election found, pass any, including draft ones.
trans-unit.target: Fuerza el cierre de las elecciones especificadas, añadiendo un voto si se escribe "true" (por defecto). Si no se encuentran ningunas elecciones, se aprueban todas (incluyendo los borradores).
Porcentaje máx. de votos en Twitch

trans-unit.id: Defines how civic actions are performed, and how officials are elected or appointed.
trans-unit.source: Defines how civic actions are performed, and how officials are elected or appointed.
trans-unit.target: Define el modo de aplicación de las acciones cívicas, y cómo se elige o designa a los funcionarios.

trans-unit.id: How to proceed if there was a tie in the election.
trans-unit.source: How to proceed if there was a tie in the election.
trans-unit.target: Procedimiento a seguir en caso de un empate en unas elecciones.

trans-unit.id: How many occupants may hold this title at once? After an election, this many candidates will be put into the position, choosing from those with the most votes.
trans-unit.source: How many occupants may hold this title at once? After an election, this many candidates will be put into the position, choosing from those with the most votes.
trans-unit.target: ¿Cuántos ocupantes pueden tener este título simultáneamente? Después de unas elecciones, esta será la cantidad de candidatos que obtendrán el título (escogidos de entre aquellos con más votos).

trans-unit.id: After a title has been held for this many days, a new election may be started for the position (if no election is started, the current occupants will remain until one is).
trans-unit.source: After a title has been held for this many days, a new election may be started for the position (if no election is started, the current occupants will remain until one is).
trans-unit.target: Después de haber sido poseedor de un título esta cantidad de días, se podrán convocar unas nuevas elecciones para esta posición (si no se hace, los ocupantes actuales seguirán ostentando el título hasta que se convoquen).
Apodo para lista de selección de juegos

trans-unit.id: Making yarn and threads made easy!
trans-unit.source: Making yarn and threads made easy!
trans-unit.target: ¡Hacer hilos y fibras es muy fácil!

trans-unit.id: A lumber dresser that lets you store your clothing and quickly switch between a designated outfit and whatever you are currently wearing.
trans-unit.source: A lumber dresser that lets you store your clothing and quickly switch between a designated outfit and whatever you are currently wearing.
trans-unit.target: Un vestidor de madera que te permite guardar tu ropa y cambiar rápidamente entre un conjunto designado y lo que estés usando en ese momento.

trans-unit.id: A larger food storage solution for when you want to keep it fresh!
trans-unit.source: A larger food storage solution for when you want to keep it fresh!
trans-unit.target: Un almacenamiento de comida más grande, ¡con el que mantener las cosas frescas!

trans-unit.id: A rough hewn wooden dresser that lets you store your clothing and quickly switch between a designated outfit and whatever you are currently wearing.
trans-unit.source: A rough hewn wooden dresser that lets you store your clothing and quickly switch between a designated outfit and whatever you are currently wearing.
trans-unit.target: Una cómoda de madera tosca que te permite guardar tu ropa y cambiar rápidamente entre un conjunto de ropa específico y lo que lleves puesto en el momento.

trans-unit.id: A group of different tools used in the processing of plant based cloth products. Excellent for a renaissance fair display.
trans-unit.source: A group of different tools used in the processing of plant based cloth products. Excellent for a renaissance fair display.
trans-unit.target: Un grupo de herramientas variadas que se usan en el procesado de los productos de tela de origen vegetal. Excelentes para una exposición renacentista.
Se usa para contratos de construcción.

trans-unit.id: A composite lumber dresser that lets you store your clothing and quickly switch between a designated outfit and whatever you are currently wearing.
trans-unit.source: A composite lumber dresser that lets you store your clothing and quickly switch between a designated outfit and whatever you are currently wearing.
trans-unit.target: Un tocador de madera compuesta que le permite guardar su ropa y cambiar rápidamente entre un conjunto de ropa específico y lo que lleves puesto en el momento.

trans-unit.id: A store in a wooden cart, very useful when your customers are far away.
trans-unit.source: A store in a wooden cart, very useful when your customers are far away.
trans-unit.target: Una tienda montada en un carro de madera. Muy útil cuando tus clientes viven lejos de tu negocio.

trans-unit.id: Creating new clothes and setting trends. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.source: Creating new clothes and setting trends. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
trans-unit.target: Habilidad para la creación de ropa nueva y la invención de nuevas tendencias de moda. Mejora su nivel creando recetas asociadas a esta habilidad.

trans-unit.id: Plant to grow a spruce tree.

trans-unit.target: Plántala para que crezca un abeto.

trans-unit.id: Food that has spoiled beyond the point of being suitable for human consumption. It can still be used for compost.

trans-unit.id: A picture displaying a captured moment.

trans-unit.id: Flax fibers spun into a usable string commonly known as linen yarn.

trans-unit.target: Fibras de lino enrolladas y convertidas en un hilo comúnmente conocido como "hilo de lino".

trans-unit.id: A rough linen fabric that covers your basic needs.

trans-unit.target: Un tejido de lino rugoso para cubrir necesidades básicas.

trans-unit.id: A bundle of harvested flax that can be processed into fabric.

trans-unit.source: Processed fibers of flax ready to be spun into yarn.

trans-unit.id: Rice grounded into flour is as equally versatile as its golden cousin.
trans-unit.source: Rice grounded into flour is as equally versatile as its golden cousin.
trans-unit.target: El arroz convertido en harina es tan versátil como su primo dorado.

trans-unit.id: Increases the damage tier of Bows
trans-unit.source: Increases the damage tier of Bows

trans-unit.id: A master tracker is capable of following its prey over the highest peaks or through the densest of jungles.

trans-unit.target: Un maestro del rastreo, capaz de seguir a su presa en los picos más altos o en las junglas más densas.

trans-unit.id: Every hit has a chance of destroying tree stumps and splitting trunks immediately.
trans-unit.source: Every hit has a chance of destroying tree stumps and splitting trunks immediately.
trans-unit.target: Todos los golpes tienen una probabilidad de destruir tocones y de talar troncos instantáneamente.

trans-unit.id: Increase you stomache capacity count by 1000cal.
trans-unit.source: Increase you stomache capacity count by 1000cal.
trans-unit.target: Aumenta tu capacidad estomacal en 1000 cal.
Aumenta el peso que puedes cargar en tu inventario en 5 kg.

trans-unit.id: This server has exhaustion, therefore you can only work for a limited amount of time each day, then you have to rest until the next day.
trans-unit.source: This server has exhaustion, therefore you can only work for a limited amount of time each day, then you have to rest until the next day.
trans-unit.target: Este servidor tiene activado el cansancio, y por lo tanto solo podrás aportar una cantidad limitada de trabajo al día, y después tendrás que descansar hasta el día siguiente.

Haz clic para ver el contrato.
Después de todos los artículos restantes

trans-unit.id: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.source: This clause will grant the contractor authorization to the selected object or property. Authorization can be granted temporarily for the length of the contract, or it can be given permanently. This permission can be given at either the beginning or end of the contract.\n\nIf you need a player to deliver something in a private container, or build on private land, you'll need to set their permissions with this clause to ensure they have access. Players accepting a contract should always ensure that they will receive the needed permissions to perform it.
trans-unit.target: Esta cláusula otorgará permisos a un cliente para acceder a un objeto o propiedad determinados. La duración de los privilegios puede ser temporal o permanente. Este permiso puede concederse tanto al inicio como al final del contrato.\n\nSi necesitas que un jugador entregue un producto en un contenedor privado o construir algo en la parcela privada de otro jugador, usa estos ajustes para que puedan acceder sin problemas. Los jugadores que acepten un contrato deben siempre asegurarse de que tienen los permisos adecuados para completarlo con éxito.

trans-unit.id: This clause allows players to define in words what they would like done. When using this clause, the contract can no longer be auto-approved, and the client will have to approve it before accepting it. When accepting a contract with a custom clause, it is wise to first review the reputation of the citizen offering it, because it is fully at their discretion to approve or deny its completion.\n\nYou must uncheck {0} at the bottom of the contract to use this clause.
trans-unit.source: This clause allows players to define in words what they would like done. When using this clause, the contract can no longer be auto-approved, and the client will have to approve it before accepting it. When accepting a contract with a custom clause, it is wise to first review the reputation of the citizen offering it, because it is fully at their discretion to approve or deny its completion.\n\nYou must uncheck {0} at the bottom of the contract to use this clause.
trans-unit.target: Esta cláusula permite a los jugadores definir con palabras las acciones que se requieren. Al emplearla, el contrano no puede ser aprobado automáticamente y el cliente tendrá que aprobarlo antes de aceptarlo. Si aceptas un contrato con una cláusula personalizada, se recomienda que eches un vistazo primero a la reputación del ciudadano que lo ofrece, ya que ellos serán los que aprueben o denieguen su terminación.\n\nDebes desmarcar {0} en la parte inferior del contrato para usar esta cláusula.

trans-unit.id: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.
trans-unit.source: Defines a road that must be built between points A and B, defined by placing a {0} at each position. The width of the road must be the defined minimum throughout, and it must be made entirely of the listed material.
trans-unit.target: Planifica un camino a construir entre los puntos A y B, que se definen colocando un {0} en cada uno de estos puntos. La anchura del camino tendrá un valor mínimo también predefinido, y deberá completarse solamente con el material especificado.

trans-unit.id:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.source:
Defines a set of blocks that must exist, or not exist on a property. This can be used for all kinds of things:
 - Removing unwanted plants
 - Removing pollution
 - Planting fields (planted blocks must exist)
 - Removing structures or obstacles.

If {0} is checked, only surface blocks will be examined. Otherwise, blocks to a depth of {1} below the highest block will be examined.
trans-unit.target:
Define un conjunto de bloques que deben existir/no existir en una propiedad. Esta opción puede emplearse con diversas funciones:
 - Eliminar plantas no deseadas
 - Eliminar contaminación
 - Plantar en campos (deben existir bloques para plantar)
 - Eliminar estructuras y obstáculos

Si se marca la opción {0}, solo se examinarán los bloques superficiales; si no, también se examinarán los bloques que estén a una profundidad máxima de {1} bloques por debajo del bloque más alto.

trans-unit.id: Your GPU's Max Tessellation Level is less than 64. AMD is the only known GPU manufacturer who doesn't follow the standard and reduces this setting to hack performance in their "AMD Radeon Software", setting it to 8 in the default optimized settings. You may experience problems with the Minimap rendering. To fix this, set "Max Tessellation Level" to 64 in the software for Eco (explicitly) and restart the game.
trans-unit.source: Your GPU's Max Tessellation Level is less than 64. AMD is the only known GPU manufacturer who doesn't follow the standard and reduces this setting to hack performance in their "AMD Radeon Software", setting it to 8 in the default optimized settings. You may experience problems with the Minimap rendering. To fix this, set "Max Tessellation Level" to 64 in the software for Eco (explicitly) and restart the game.
trans-unit.target: Tu GPU tiene un nivel de teselado máximo menor de 64. AMD es el único fabricante de GPUs que no sigue los estándares en estos sistemas, reduciendo este ajuste para "engañar" al rendimiento con su AMD Radeon Software, empleando un valor de 8 en sus ajustes optimizados por defecto. Podrías tener problemas con el renderizado del minimapa si mantienes estos ajustes. Para corregirlo, se recomienda cambiar el "Nivel máximo de teselado" a 64 en el software de Eco (de forma explícita) y reiniciar el juego.

trans-unit.id: on - Tooltips are locked if the cursor doesn't move for a specified time or if the lock key is pressed.\n\noff - Tooltips are only locked if the lock key is pressed.

trans-unit.target: ON - Las ventanas emergentes quedarán bloqueadas si el cursor no se mueve durante un tiempo determinado o si se pulsa la tecla de bloqueo.\n\nOFF - Las ventanas emergentes solo se bloquearán si se pulsa la tecla de bloqueo.

trans-unit.id:
Level of Details determines how good environment (like grass, leaves, etc.) looks in game and how far it is visible.
Also affects small animals.

Performance impact: Average
trans-unit.source:
Level of Details determines how good environment (like grass, leaves, etc.) looks in game and how far it is visible.
Also affects small animals.

Performance impact: Average
trans-unit.target:
El nivel de detalles determina la definición y la visibilidad de los detalles ambientales del juego (como la hierba, las hojas...).
También afecta a los animales pequeños.

Impacto en el rendimiento: medio

trans-unit.id: Max number of slots allowed on at one time (negative is infinite).

trans-unit.id: Number of additional slots allowed beyond Max Connections for users who have been assigned queue priority permissions. Set to -1 for infinite.
trans-unit.source: Number of additional slots allowed beyond Max Connections for users who have been assigned queue priority permissions. Set to -1 for infinite.

Intensidad de desvanecimiento de sonido según distancia

trans-unit.id: The maximum distance from which a listener can hear a speaking player. Requires restart.
trans-unit.source: The maximum distance from which a listener can hear a speaking player. Requires restart.
trans-unit.target: Distancia máxima desde donde un oyente puede entender a un jugador que habla (se requiere reinicio del juego).

trans-unit.id: Controls the range within which a speaker’s audio remains at its original volume, and beyond which the loudness of the voice chat starts to fade out when heard. Requires restart.
trans-unit.source: Controls the range within which a speaker’s audio remains at its original volume, and beyond which the loudness of the voice chat starts to fade out when heard. Requires restart.
trans-unit.target: Controla el rango en el que el sonido de un altavoz se mantiene en su volumen de origen, y el volumen a partir del cual las voces del chat se atenuarán (se requiere reinicio del juego).

trans-unit.id: Specifies the formula or curve that controls the shape of how the audio fades between the ConversationalDistance and the AudibleDistance. Requires restart.
trans-unit.source: Specifies the formula or curve that controls the shape of how the audio fades between the ConversationalDistance and the AudibleDistance. Requires restart.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la fórmula o curva que controla la curva de atenuación del audio entre los valores dados por ConversationalDistance y AudibleDistance (se requiere reinicio del juego).

trans-unit.id: Controls the amplitude of the AudioFadeModel curve, which allows the attenuation of the voice chat loudness to become more or less extreme. Requires restart.
trans-unit.source: Controls the amplitude of the AudioFadeModel curve, which allows the attenuation of the voice chat loudness to become more or less extreme. Requires restart.
trans-unit.target: Controla la amplitud de la curva AudioFadeModel, que permite el control del volumen en las voces de chat para atenuarlo o aumentarlo (se requiere reinicio del juego).

trans-unit.id: Adjusts the default shelf life of all foods, with higher values causing food to last longer. For example, setting to 2 doubles the shelf life while setting to 0.5 halves the shelf life.
trans-unit.source: Adjusts the default shelf life of all foods, with higher values causing food to last longer. For example, setting to 2 doubles the shelf life while setting to 0.5 halves the shelf life.

trans-unit.source: We calculate updated procedural starting positions ever X minutes set here. The settlement starting points are updated instantly.
trans-unit.target: Calculamos las posiciones iniciales actualizadas proceduralmente cada X minutos (valor ajustado con este parámetro). Los puntos iniciales del asentamiento se actualizarán inmediatamente.

trans-unit.id: Invite a member of a lower-level settlement to become a member of this settlement (or accept their application to do so, if it exists). The target settlement will also need to perform a civic action to accept the invitation and become a child of this settlement.
trans-unit.source: Invite a member of a lower-level settlement to become a member of this settlement (or accept their application to do so, if it exists). The target settlement will also need to perform a civic action to accept the invitation and become a child of this settlement.
trans-unit.target: Invita a un miembro de un asentamiento de bajo nivel para que se convierta en miembro de este asentamiento (o acepta su solicitud, en caso de que la haya enviado). El asentamiento objetivo también necesitará realizar una acción cívica para aceptar la invitación y convertirse en un asentamiento dependiente de este asentamiento.

trans-unit.id: Apply for this settlement to become a member of a higher-level settlement (or accept an invitation to do so, if it exists). The targeted settlement will also need to perform a civic action to accept this settlement as a child.
trans-unit.source: Apply for this settlement to become a member of a higher-level settlement (or accept an invitation to do so, if it exists). The targeted settlement will also need to perform a civic action to accept this settlement as a child.
trans-unit.target: Envía tu solicitud a este asentamiento para convertirte en miembro de un asentamiento de mayor nivel (o acepta su invitación, en caso de que la haya enviado). El asentamiento objetivo también necesitará realizar una acción cívica para aceptar este asentamiento como uno dependiente del mismo.

trans-unit.source: Set a culture-boost to any settlement. If null is passed, will take the lowest-tier settlement the user is a citizen of, or an arbitrary settlement if they are not a citizen of any.

trans-unit.id: Claims plots in a given rect. If you're already standing on a claim you have auth on, it will use the existing deed. Otherwise, a new deed is created.
trans-unit.source: Claims plots in a given rect. If you're already standing on a claim you have auth on, it will use the existing deed. Otherwise, a new deed is created.
trans-unit.target: Reclama los terrenos en una línea recta dada. Si ya estás en un terreno sobre el cual tienes derechos, se usará la escritura existente. Si no es así, se creará una nueva escritura.

trans-unit.source: Once a settlement has enough surronding plots of a target it wants to annex, it must then exceed its culture by a given amount. The amount of culture that is counted towards annexing depends on {0} the target is.

trans-unit.id: This setting defines how plants will be grouped when the world generates. It have two levels of grouping: clusters and groups. A cluster is a large area of the world where a particular type of plant exists, and it affects gameplay by limiting where specific plants can be spawned. Groups are primarily for visual purposes, so plants of the same species grow together with only a small distance between them.
trans-unit.source: This setting defines how plants will be grouped when the world generates. It have two levels of grouping: clusters and groups. A cluster is a large area of the world where a particular type of plant exists, and it affects gameplay by limiting where specific plants can be spawned. Groups are primarily for visual purposes, so plants of the same species grow together with only a small distance between them.
trans-unit.target: Este ajuste defina como las plantas serían grupadas cuando genera el mundo. Tiene dos niveles de agrupación: agrupaciones y grupos. Una agrupación es una zona grande del mundo donde existe un tipo específico de planta, y afecta el modo de juego por limitando donde plantas específicas se puede engendrar. Los grupos son principalmentes con fines visuales, así que plantas del mismo especíes crecen juntas sólo una distancia pequena entrelas.

trans-unit.id: Defines what percent of citizens a source settlement must have more than, relative to a target settlement in order to annex (1 means 'same number', .5 means 'half')
trans-unit.source: Defines what percent of citizens a source settlement must have more than, relative to a target settlement in order to annex (1 means 'same number', .5 means 'half')

trans-unit.id: When an annexation happens, the resources used in the anneaxtion will have this percent destroyed, with the rest given to the non-abandoned citizens of the target of the annex. These are wasted resources due to forcing an action rather than coming to an agreement. 1 means destroy everything, .5 means destroy half, 0 means destroy none.
trans-unit.source: When an annexation happens, the resources used in the anneaxtion will have this percent destroyed, with the rest given to the non-abandoned citizens of the target of the annex. These are wasted resources due to forcing an action rather than coming to an agreement. 1 means destroy everything, .5 means destroy half, 0 means destroy none.

trans-unit.id:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.

The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.

trans-unit.id: Annexing a target requires paying them Claim Papers from the source settlement. Unlike resources, these 100% go to the foundation of the target without waste. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.\n\nIn the case of annexing a Homestead, this number will be increased by the number of Homestead Support Claim Papers that are on the stake. This makes the support claims not only allow homesteads to claim more plots, but have more protection against annexation.
trans-unit.source: Annexing a target requires paying them Claim Papers from the source settlement. Unlike resources, these 100% go to the foundation of the target without waste. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.\n\nIn the case of annexing a Homestead, this number will be increased by the number of Homestead Support Claim Papers that are on the stake. This makes the support claims not only allow homesteads to claim more plots, but have more protection against annexation.

trans-unit.id:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.
trans-unit.source:
The resources shown must exist in storage attached to an Embassy Desk that is assigned to the Settlement's jurisdiction. They must be accessible to the leader of the Settlement. The cost is determined per-non-abandoned citizen in the target.

Upon annexation, a percent of these will be given to the other party, and the rest destroyed as the cost of the annexation.

If all citizens of a target are 'Abandoned', no resources are needed.

trans-unit.source: Set Estimated Hours Played Per Day

trans-unit.id: This setting will help match you to a world where Citizens play similar lengths of time, so you progress at similar rates.
trans-unit.source: This setting will help match you to a world where Citizens play similar lengths of time, so you progress at similar rates.

trans-unit.id: Note: These values are generated from the settings \nabove and will adjust as you change them.
trans-unit.source: Note: These values are generated from the settings \nabove and will adjust as you change them.

trans-unit.id: If unchecked, the default world will be used. Note: if world size is adjusted from normal, the world will always generate randomly.
trans-unit.source: If unchecked, the default world will be used. Note: if world size is adjusted from normal, the world will always generate randomly.

trans-unit.id: Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.
trans-unit.source: Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.

trans-unit.id: When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. While exhausted, they cannot spend calories, but can still do other activities like making culture, etc. This setting is used to prevent some players from getting ahead of everyone else by playing many more hours than everyone else.
trans-unit.source: When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. While exhausted, they cannot spend calories, but can still do other activities like making culture, etc. This setting is used to prevent some players from getting ahead of everyone else by playing many more hours than everyone else.

trans-unit.id: Expected number of players that will be contributing towards the meteor. Adjusting this will change the number of specialties each person can take (depending on collaboration level).
trans-unit.source: Expected number of players that will be contributing towards the meteor. Adjusting this will change the number of specialties each person can take (depending on collaboration level).

trans-unit.id: How much collaboration citizens are expected to take part in. High collaboration means everyone will be highly reliant on the society functioning properly. No collaboration means no dependence is required, but you can still trade.
trans-unit.source: How much collaboration citizens are expected to take part in. High collaboration means everyone will be highly reliant on the society functioning properly. No collaboration means no dependence is required, but you can still trade.

trans-unit.id: How strictly do you want to simulate logisitics like transport, inventory carry size, etc. Higher settings will make transport more important (you will need vehicles to move large quantities) and lower settings will allow individuals to carry large amounts, removing need for vehicles.
trans-unit.source: How strictly do you want to simulate logisitics like transport, inventory carry size, etc. Higher settings will make transport more important (you will need vehicles to move large quantities) and lower settings will allow individuals to carry large amounts, removing need for vehicles.

trans-unit.id: Plants will grow overtime, and can then be harvested.
trans-unit.source: Plants will grow overtime, and can then be harvested.

trans-unit.id: If you specialize in farming later, you can build a Farmers Table.
trans-unit.source: If you specialize in farming later, you can build a Farmers Table.

trans-unit.id: Different biomes will affect plant growth differently.
trans-unit.source: Different biomes will affect plant growth differently.

trans-unit.id: A Farmer's Table will let you craft seeds in greater quantities as well as fertilizers to improve yield.
trans-unit.source: A Farmer's Table will let you craft seeds in greater quantities as well as fertilizers to improve yield.

trans-unit.id: As technology advances, you'll be able to use vehicles to perform farming tasks on a grand scale.
trans-unit.source: As technology advances, you'll be able to use vehicles to perform farming tasks on a grand scale.

trans-unit.id: As research progresses, new vehicle types will be unlocked that can transport, harvest, plow, and mine in large quantities.
trans-unit.source: As research progresses, new vehicle types will be unlocked that can transport, harvest, plow, and mine in large quantities.

trans-unit.id: Citizens who specialize in Engineering will be able to build new vehicles, roads, and ramps, making long-distance transport easier.
trans-unit.source: Citizens who specialize in Engineering will be able to build new vehicles, roads, and ramps, making long-distance transport easier.

trans-unit.id: Trade is very important in Eco.\n
trans-unit.source: Trade is very important in Eco.\n

trans-unit.id: There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.
trans-unit.source: There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.

trans-unit.id: Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.
trans-unit.source: Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.

trans-unit.id: The economy viewer will show you all the active trades in the world, as well as Work Parties, Contracts, Rental Offers, Repair Bounties, and more.
trans-unit.source: The economy viewer will show you all the active trades in the world, as well as Work Parties, Contracts, Rental Offers, Repair Bounties, and more.

trans-unit.id: Use it to buy and sell both goods and services to other citizens.
trans-unit.source: Use it to buy and sell both goods and services to other citizens.

trans-unit.id: An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
trans-unit.source: An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
